Friends,
**I recently signed the America First Alabama Pledge!** [](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=a888af912fc04d48a396a0b79441d423&_e=opYzzBIqcSjHASzS5iW_VXpYS5sB6Phs5sgOIDOz-_6W4dRJFrOxMVIFauQRJGRr3FaAh2BuakBaWN7RfH2XLUhv5s4mbQJlCWLXG43DgRjw15LiQ-mwnb2dTdjncnzzQxrNZLcqUAQHRrciJhueH9xHeC4e2Uz0vodF8sBn-3K9OOb7tChm4ZCZjyIagzSjAcA_PmBD3TS_1GNOlTXSFxylJxViHAp5OSuP8NbpYMBgBMrWQRZMg6NWQHmU5UDHj3VefcJVJf6kqSZKaDJTqFHsI68v1ejGh_3s7ruG2PYp-ctobrTGzbMAB75-MmzORVvDIdke5jlh5GF3Fs0Zam0k1UCOlblpunn1eASpf5PY4BjaXPFElAjdtO3n-lUv5ueyl_vOk5CU5Z-cnYnbF02jIf_FFw2C8G6npiLkLL-K3dDc-IbPlRp_dHmt2Il--YettPkcPnn_qPG3i4i_RiCEsUYk0veYZ0HIL7YxFDw30XkPg0LA05_FTXlPAA7G)

**I’m running to be your next U.S. Senator from Alabama because I know that Career Politicians have failed us for too long.** I’ve watched as the Biden administration has deserted our core principles – they’ve abandoned our allies, along with American citizens, in Afghanistan; cowered to the influence of the Chinese as they evade responsibility for the Wuhan Virus; and let the radical left open our borders. [**Will you join my campaign? >>>.**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=a888af912fc04d48a396a0b79441d423&_e=opYzzBIqcSjHASzS5iW_VXpYS5sB6Phs5sgOIDOz-_6W4dRJFrOxMVIFauQRJGRr3FaAh2BuakBaWN7RfH2XLUhv5s4mbQJlCWLXG43DgRjw15LiQ-mwnb2dTdjncnzzQxrNZLcqUAQHRrciJhueH9xHeC4e2Uz0vodF8sBn-3K9OOb7tChm4ZCZjyIagzSjAcA_PmBD3TS_1GNOlTXSFxylJxViHAp5OSuP8NbpYMBgBMrWQRZMg6NWQHmU5UDHj3VefcJVJf6kqSZKaDJTqFHsI68v1ejGh_3s7ruG2PYilqsHYhBBFxuVviygwFfcjFOW8Yxr3B5KNel6ubjL4lfQpjLvESGBC8t-JRRj64AaYtcRKM2dDJFmqTijsgrh-xrr98odiGewKu7B-nc0GPT334cTWOrADQTaVPxE2n1If0BEKx8-HyTqxBemt92Z31ioVhxdCrWTLp7WmS9fxgD_7xqBHZekg_EKrrSVY0H4MlEAFQVP2PBmGoeEdT0_)

**By signing the America First Alabama Pledge, I pledge to you that:**
* I will always vote against any bill that puts other nations before America.
* I will represent you in your time of need as best as I am capable of, including but not limited to standing up against any political party that seeks to make my Constituents' life more difficult.
* I will put my Constituents' needs in front of my own. No financial benefits from lobbyists will interfere with my Constituents' needs.
* I will work tirelessly to pursue a better life for my children and my Constituents' children. Failure is not an option.
* I will not use your tax money unwisely. I will not sell you out to benefit myself or seek to make my current position a life-long career.
* I will stand for the 2nd amendment so you can thrive vigorously and freely while the threat of oppression can only loom sparsely with no consequences.
* I will stand against open American borders so we can fix our own problems first.

I signed the America First Alabama pledge because failure is not an option. I’m running to represent the good people of Alabama – not the special interests, lobbyists, and woke mob. I’m a former Prisoner of War, a 22-year Army veteran, a pro-Trump conservative, a businessman, and a father of six.

_**Join me as I sign up for one more tour of duty: one to serve my country and Alabama in the U.S. Senate.**_

name: Press - Dolan For Ohio
subject: What They Are Saying About Matt Dolan’s Statement on January 6: “The only adult in the room”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc
body:
No images? Click here https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-e-bqjkiy-idulfldlt-m/

What They Are Saying About Matt Dolan’s Statement on January 6: “The only adult in the room”

On Thursday, U.S. Senate candidate Matt Dolan continued to differentiate himself from the Republican field in Ohio with his statement recognizing the one-year anniversary of January 6. As other candidates downplayed and ignored the anniversary, Dolan called them out as “fake conservatives” for their objections to certifying the 2020 election. Ohio and national news media were quick to highlight the apparent contrast.

The Cleveland Plain Dealer [https://www.cleveland.com/news/2022/01/matt-dolans-solemn-commemoration-of-jan-6-riots-at-us-capitol-sharply-contrast-with-rest-of-gop-us-senate-field-in-ohio.html]: Matt Dolan’s solemn commemoration of Jan. 6 riots at U.S. Capitol sharply contrasts with rest of GOP U.S. Senate Field in Ohio

“A new statement from state Sen. Matt Dolan commemorating the one-year anniversary of the deadly riot at the U.S. Capitol by Trump supporters last Jan. 6 stands well apart from the rest of the Republicans running for an open U.S. Senate seat in Ohio.

“In contrast to his opponents, who this week have downplayed the attack or criticized the official response to it, Dolan’s statement calls the events an ‘attack on American democracy, our Constitution and the rule of law.’

“Dolan said some Democrats were wrong to object to the results of the 2004 presidential election, which unlike 2020, was certified without serious opposition. He said other Republicans running in this year’s U.S. Senate are similarly wrong and show a ‘blatant disregard for the Constitution, the rule of law and truth inside our Republic’.”

***

Darrel Rowland [https://twitter.com/darreldrowland/status/1479227830265331712], Senior Editor, Columbus Dispatch

“...By attempting to position himself as the only adult in the room, can we win a Republican primary in the year 2022?”

***

Gannett Ohio [https://www.dispatch.com/story/news/2022/01/06/jan-6-insurrection-one-year-later-ohio-feels-consequences-attack/8929022002/]: 'A stain on our nation's history.' One year later, January 6 attack reverberates in Ohio politics and 2022 elections

“Only state Sen. Matt Dolan has said firmly that the 2020 election was legitimate and cast his Republican primary opponents as ‘fake conservatives’ for saying they wouldn't have certified the results.”

***

NBC News [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/live-blog/january-6-capitol-riot-anniversary-n1287036/ncrd1287071#liveBlogHeader]: GOP Senate candidate in Ohio slams primary rivals for embracing stolen election lies

“Dolan is the lone Republican [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/first-ohio-s-gop-senate-primary-candidate-ignoring-trump-n1279627] in Ohio’s closely watched Senate race who is not aggressively seeking Trump’s endorsement. Although his statement did not single out anyone by name, each of his primary rivals to varying degrees has accommodated Trump’s election lies.”

***

Taylor Popielarz [https://twitter.com/TaylorPopielarz/status/1479167867400695817], Reporter, Spectrum News 1 Ohio

“...the one Republican in the race who condemns the Capitol attack outright”

***

Cleveland Scene [https://www.clevescene.com/scene-and-heard/archives/2022/01/06/bernie-moreno-honors-solemn-anniversary-of-jan-6-capitol-insurrection-by-further-debasing-himself]: Bernie Moreno Honors Solemn Anniversary of Jan. 6 Capitol Insurrection By Further Debasing Himself

“...Matt Dolan is the only candidate who's chosen to tell the truth.”

***

The news media coverage highlighting Matt Dolan’s statement follows months of press on the campaign trail in Ohio in which editorial boards and reporters have highlighted Matt’s Dolan’s experience, relentless focus on substance and issues impacting Ohio.

Hours after launching his candidacy, The Cleveland Plain Dealer published an editorial [https://www.cleveland.com/opinion/2021/09/republicans-hoping-to-reclaim-their-party-need-to-unite-behind-matt-dolans-senate-bid-editorial.html] stating that “Republicans hoping to reclaim their party need to unite behind Matt Dolan’s Senate bid.”

Dolan received recognition from The Columbus Dispatch [https://www.dispatch.com/story/news/politics/elections/2021/10/24/ohio-senate-race-gop-candidates-meet-forum-hugh-hewitt/8526756002/] after the first major candidates forum in October, noting that he “distinguished himself from his opponents right out of the gate” and “carved out his lane.” Similarly, The Cleveland Plain Dealer [https://www.cleveland.com/open/2021/10/republican-ohio-us-senate-candidates-court-evangelical-conservatives-at-suburban-columbus-forum.html?outputType=amp&__twitter_impression=true] labeled him as the “one major exception” in the race of carbon copy candidates, who “presented himself as an experienced, practical politician who would get things done and attract independent voters in November.”

The Toledo Blade [https://www.toledoblade.com/local/politics/2021/08/19/Is-Matt-Dolan-the-Rob-Portman-who-can-replace-Rob-Portman/stories/20210818130] reported in their story entitled “Is Matt Dolan the Rob Portman who can replace Rob Portman?” that “Mr. Dolan is the only Republican in the vicinity of the race talking so directly about things like jobs, security, and education in terms of action in Washington. Candidates Josh Mandel and J.D. Vance are known for riling followers on Twitter. Investment banker Mike Gibbons, entrepreneur Bernie Moreno, and former party chairman Jane Timken are hewing closely to Mr. Trump and tapping into cultural wedge issues."

National publications like The Wall Street Journal [https://www.wsj.com/articles/how-tight-is-trumps-grip-on-the-gop-take-a-look-at-the-ohio-senate-primary-11633527050] have also taken note of Dolan’s sole occupancy of the “traditional pro-business candidate” lane, explaining that when it comes to the similarity of the Republican field, “the one exception is Matt Dolan.” [https://twitter.com/dolan4ohio]

Paid For By Dolan For Ohio, Inc.

Preferences https://dolanforohioinc.updatemyprofile.com/y-bqjkiy-FC066A9E-idulfldlt-c | Unsubscribe https://dolanforohioinc.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bqjkiy-idulfldlt-q/

Yesterday, Joe spoke to a crowd of his fellow Texans at the January 6 Day of Remembrance & Action organized by Indivisible - Austin.

[**Check out the video of Joe's speech at the State Capitol here.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=866508b001&e=5d8d80652b)

We must not forget the role Texas AG Ken Paxton played in the attack on our democracy on January 6. He can not be trusted to perform the duties of the Office of the Texas Attorney General, but to stop him, we have to beat him at the polls.

That's what Joe is here to do. **But we need your help.**

[**Will you contribute to Joe's campaign to defeat Ken Paxton?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=68262bc178&e=5d8d80652b)

Many have said that the events of January 6, 2021 were simply "practice" for the main event of stealing the 2024 election. We can't let that happen. **Let's stand together and protect democracy.

Remember: the Texas Primary is March, 1, 2022** — less than 53 days! It's time to get active and bring the energy we need to win this election. We can't do it without you.
Team Jaworski

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s a “dead heat”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. | | Dear ,
You aren't going to want to miss this... _**January 28-30 in McAllen TX**_ , join me, Gen. Michael Flynn, Rear Adm. Chuck Kubic, Sam Sorbo and others for frank discussion about Domestic Security and how Election Integrity is compromised by the Biden Administrations plan to import illegal voters...

_**That's right, they plan to cancel out your vote lust like they are doing in New York City, where a few weeks ago officials announced that hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens would be allowed to vote in local elections.**_

And that is how the insurgency marches on. Join us. Tickets cover the cost of the event, and range from $15 General Admission up to $225 for VIP's. Sponsorships are also available for this epic event.

_There are a limited number of VIP Border Tour tickets available as well, limit 50._

Visit [https://WeStandAmerica.com](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6987501217&e=44b8c466b0) to get your ticket and prepare to be equipped, energized and empowered.

Election integrity is what I stand for, and with you at this event, we tell the rest of the nation, NOT ON OUR WATCH, we will not sit down and shut up with the insurgency sucks the life blood out of our republic. Get you ticket today, and if you show up, _He_ might show up too.

clean_body: Will be Big | | | | | Dear , You aren't going to want to miss this... January 28-30 in McAllen TX , join me, Gen. Michael Flynn, Rear Adm. Chuck Kubic, Sam Sorbo and others for frank discussion about Domestic Security and how Election Integrity is compromised by the Biden Administrations plan to import illegal voters... That's right, they plan to cancel out your vote lust like they are doing in New York City, where a few weeks ago officials announced that hundreds of thousands of illegal aliens would be allowed to vote in local elections. And that is how the insurgency marches on. Join us. Tickets cover the cost of the event, and range from $15 General Admission up to $225 for VIP's. Sponsorships are also available for this epic event. There are a limited number of VIP Border Tour tickets available as well, limit 50. Visit to get your ticket and prepare to be equipped, energized and empowered. Election integrity is what I stand for, and with you at this event, we tell the rest of the nation, NOT ON OUR WATCH, we will not sit down and shut up with the insurgency sucks the life blood out of our republic. Get you ticket today, and if you show up, He might show up too. | | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. body: Garland DOJ Targets Parents! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues for Records of Garland Memo Targeting Parents [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26564&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9BS1lNaHNyZDN1Zz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Did you ever imagine there would come a day when the attorney general of the United States would wield his awesome power and set the FBI against parents attending school board meetings – and does it in league with a leftist-controlled special interest group that brands parents “domestic terrorists?” We’re not going to leave this alone. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for all FBI records related to the October 4, 2021, memorandum issued by Attorney General Garland targeting parents who object to critical race theory being taught in schools (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice_ [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26546&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWdhcmxhbmQtc2Nob29sLXRocmVhdHMtY29tcGxhaW50LTAzMzg5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] (No. 1:21-cv-03389)). We sued after the FBI failed to respond to an October 6, 2021, FOIA request for: All records related to the October 4, 2021 memorandum issued by Attorney General Garland titled “Partnership Among Federal, State, Local, Tribal, and Territorial Law Enforcement to Address Threats Against School Administrators, Board Members, Teachers, and Staff.” This request includes, but is not limited to, all records related to any actions planned or taken by the Federal Bureau of Investigation in response to the memorandum, as well as all related records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI and any other individual or entity. Garland testified [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26548&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj12XzVDeGE2dTF2MCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] that he based his memorandum on a letter [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26549&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnNiYS5vcmcvLS9tZWRpYS9OU0JBL0ZpbGUvbnNiYS1mZWRlcmFsLWFzc2lzdGFuY2UtbGV0dGVyLTkyOTIwMjEucGRmP2xhPWVuJmhhc2g9NDMwQTM4MzNBNTJGQjFEMkI4REYyNTE2MEJDRDhFRkZCREU5M0NDMiZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] from the National School Board Association (NSBA) that labeled parents as “domestic terrorists.” The National School Boards Association later issued an apology [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26550&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubnNiYS5vcmcvTmV3cy8yMDIxL2xldHRlci10by1tZW1iZXJzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz] for the letter. In November, Republicans on the House Judiciary Committee questioned the completeness [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26551&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9yZXB1YmxpY2Fucy1qdWRpY2lhcnkuaG91c2UuZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDIxLzExLzIwMjEtMTEtMTYtSkRKLXRvLUdhcmxhbmQtcmUtY29tcGxldGVuZXNzLW9mLXRlc3RpbW9ueS5wZGY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] of Garland’s testimony. The Biden administration wants to target parents as “terrorists” by abusing the power of the FBI and DOJ to intimidate parents who oppose the racist and anti-American critical race theory agenda. Adding to the scandal is that we had to file a federal FOIA lawsuit because the agencies are in cover-up mode over this shocking abuse of power. NEW CDC RECORDS DETAIL AGENCY HEAD WALENSKY WANTED DETAILS OF DEATH OF TEENAGER REPORTED TO VACCINE ADVERSE EVENT REPORTING SYSTEM Many Americans are concerned about side effects of the COVID vaccines and, it turns out, so are the bureaucrats dictating that we get it. We obtained 314 pages [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26559&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1yaXNrcy1vZi1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1ub3ZlbWJlci0yMDIxLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] of records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention that show Director Rochelle Walensky’s communications, which include her request for details about the death of a teenager who died days after receiving a coronavirus vaccination. We obtained the records in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request sent on September 9, 2021, for: All emails sent to and from CDC Director Rochelle Walensky referencing the terms ‘Antibody Dependent Enhancement’, ‘ADE’ (when used to represent Antibody Dependent Enhancement), ‘pathological priming’, ‘pre-priming’, ‘paradoxical immune enhancement’, and/or ‘disease enhancement’. On June 28, 2021, Walensky forwarded an article [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26560&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1yaXNrcy1vZi1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1ub3ZlbWJlci0yMDIxLXBncy0yMjMtMzA5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] titled “CDC reportedly probing Michigan teen's death after COVID-19 vaccination” to her subordinates, asking, “Any details on this?” Dr. Henry Walke, director of CDC’s Division of Preparedness and Emerging Infections, forwarded Walensky’s request to another official, David Fitter, who replied, “The case had been reported to VAERS [CDC’s Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26561&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly92YWVycy5oaHMuZ292Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]]. CDC has spoken with ME [Medical Examiner], but we are following protocol for f/u [follow-up] re the case. Additionally, CDC remains in contact with MI to assist in the investigation.” CDC official Jennifer Layden followed up the same day, writing: For awareness, further details. This case was reported through VAERS, and the investigation is proceeding. >From safety team: CDC is not actively involved in this investigation (i.e., IDPB examining specimens). We have made contact with the state health department and the pathologist who did the autopsy and are in touch to maintain situational awareness. The initial report is in VAERS and we will receive the final autopsy report when it is complete. I can't speak to how the reporter got his/her information and came to his/her conclusions, but this is being investigated at the state level, as are all deaths. The autopsy was completed when we contacted the state health department and no request for CDC assistance has been made. - The patient was a male aged 13 years with no notable medical history. - He was found unresponsive 2 days after vaccination. Aside from a fever, he was in his usual state of health prior to his demise. - An autopsy has been performed; the results and final report are pending. - CDC and the state health department are in communication about this case, which remains under investigation. - The pathologist indicated that there appeared to be bilateral ventricular enlargement and histology consistent with myocarditis, but those were preliminary findings. Walke forwarded this email to Walensky, writing, “More info.” Walensky replied, “Grateful... R”. On August 20, 2021, Christie Bloomquist, an AstraZeneca vice president for corporate affairs, North America, emailed [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26562&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1yaXNrcy1vZi1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1ub3ZlbWJlci0yMDIxLXBncy0zMTEtMzE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] Walensky a press release stating that “The reduced Fc receptor binding aims to minimize the risk of antibody-dependent enhancement of disease - a phenomenon in which virus-specific antibodies promote, rather than inhibit, infection and/or disease.” On July 26, 2021, Walensky received via email a study [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26563&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1yaXNrcy1vZi1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1ub3ZlbWJlci0yMDIxLXBncy01LTI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] from a person whose name is redacted titled “Six Month Safety and Efficacy of the BNT162b2 mRNA COVID-19 Vaccine.” According to the researchers, the study included 44,165 randomized participants. “Of these participants, 44,060 were vaccinated with 2:1 dose (BNT162b2, n=22,030; placebo, n=22,030), and 98% received dose 2 (Fig.l). During the blinded period, 51% of participants in each group had 4 to <6 months of follow-up post dose 2; 8% of BNT162b2 recipients and 6% of placebo recipients had 2:6 months follow-up post-dose 2.” The researchers found [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26563&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NkYy1yaXNrcy1vZi1jb3ZpZC12YWNjaW5lcy1ub3ZlbWJlci0yMDIxLXBncy01LTI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==] that: Adverse event analyses during the blinded period are provided for 43,847 ≥16-year-olds (Table S3). Reactogenicity events among participants not in the reactogenicity subset are reported as adverse events, resulting in imbalances in adverse events (30% vs 14%), related adverse events (24% vs 6%), and severe adverse events (1.2% vs 0.7%) between BNT162b2 and placebo groups. Decreased appetite, lethargy, asthenia, malaise, night sweats, and hyperhidrosis were new adverse events attributable to BNT162b2 not previously identified in earlier reports. The study was paid for and conducted by Pfizer and BioNTech. The American people have the right to know as much as possible about the safety of the COVID vaccines, and the CDC needs to be more transparent about its investigations of COVID vaccine adverse events, including deaths, reported on VAERS. ARIZONA CROSSING SEES 2,404.9% HIKE IN ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS OVER LAST YEAR The Biden border crisis is an existential threat to America. Crossing into our land are people from nations all over the earth, and the numbers are staggering, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26554&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXJpem9uYS1jcm9zc2luZy1zZWVzLTI0MDQtOS1oaWtlLWluLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1vdmVyLWxhc3QteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]. As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26565&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjb3JkLWJyZWFraW5nLW1leGljYW4tYm9yZGVyLWFycmVzdHMtY2FyYXZhbi1lbi1yb3V0ZS1wYW5hbWEtd2FybnMtNjVrLW1vcmUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September. As the new year gets underway, the numbers are growing at a disturbing rate for the municipality with a population of about 96,000. The city’s mayor recently declared a local emergency [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26566&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueXVtYWF6Lmdvdi9Ib21lL0NvbXBvbmVudHMvTmV3cy9OZXdzLzY3My8zMDg/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] due to the humanitarian and border crisis caused by the unprecedented surge of migrants entering the area. During a five-day period in early December, more than 6,000 illegal immigrants crossed from Mexico through the Yuma area, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) figures cited in the mayor’s declaration. “Migrants are traveling through Yuma during a time of great uncertainty about the COVID-19 virus, and without provisions for adequate food, water, shelter, transportation and medical care,” a statement [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57595&L=26566&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueXVtYWF6Lmdvdi9Ib21lL0NvbXBvbmVudHMvTmV3cy9OZXdzLzY3My8zMDg/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=] announcing the order reads. “This surge of migrants has and will continue to strain the ability of medical staff and local hospital resources to provide essential and necessary medical care.” In the statement Yuma Mayor Douglas Nicholls says the change in the movement of migrants greatly impacts his community. That includes the area’s agriculture industry because migrants are passing on foot through active agriculture fields. “The encroachment on active production fields results in food safety concerns and the destruction of crops, which leads to significant economic loss and property damage in the farming community, loss of agriculture-related jobs, and a threat to the nation’s food security,” the city emergency declaration states. Yuma is hardly the only Border Patrol sector to start the year with a bang, the government figures show. Around 980 miles away, the Del Rio station in Texas has seen a 237.8% surge in illegal immigrants over the same period last year. Two other Texas sectors—Rio Grande Valley and Big Bend—also report alarming spikes at 166.6% and 118.7% respectively. Other crossings in Texas, California and Arizona have also seen major increases in illegal immigrants in the first two months of fiscal year 2022. San Diego reports an 89.1% boost, Tucson 71.9%, and El Paso 68.5%. Each of the crossings finished fiscal year 2021 with unprecedented gains in apprehensions. Del Rio led the pack with a 542.7% surge while Rio Grande Valley had a 508.7% increase. Big Bend and EL Paso recorded apprehension gains of 331.9% and 256.5% respectively in fiscal year 2021. Most of the illegal aliens, 608,000, arrested by the U.S. in 2021 came from Mexico followed by the Central American nations of Honduras (309,000), Guatemala (279,000) and El Salvador (96,000). Nevertheless, federal agents along the Mexican border are encountering a lot more migrants from nations outside of Latin America, including those with terrorist ties. In fact, thousands of illegal immigrants from Africa and the Middle East were arrested in the first month of this fiscal year, indicating an alarming trend among migrants entering the country through the porous southern border. clean_body: Garland DOJ Targets Parents! [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Sues for Records of Garland Memo Targeting Parents [==] Did you ever imagine there would come a day when the attorney general of the United States would wield his awesome power and set the FBI against parents attending school board meetings – and does it in league with a leftist-controlled special interest group that brands parents “domestic terrorists?” We’re not going to leave this alone. We filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit for all FBI records related to the October 4, 2021, memorandum issued by Attorney General Garland targeting parents who object to critical race theory being taught in schools (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [==] (No. 1:21-cv-03389)). We sued after the FBI failed to respond to an October 6, 2021, FOIA request for: All records related to the October 4, 2021 memorandum issued by Attorney General Garland titled “Partnership Among Federal, State, Local, Tribal, and Territorial Law Enforcement to Address Threats Against School Administrators, Board Members, Teachers, and Staff.” This request includes, but is not limited to, all records related to any actions planned or taken by the Federal Bureau of Investigation in response to the memorandum, as well as all related records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI and any other individual or entity. Garland testified [==] that he based his memorandum on a letter [==] from the National School Board Association (NSBA) that labeled parents as “domestic terrorists.” The National School Boards Association later issued an apology [] for the letter. In November, Republicans on the House Judiciary Committee questioned the completeness [=] of Garland’s testimony. The Biden administration wants to target parents as “terrorists” by abusing the power of the FBI and DOJ to intimidate parents who oppose the racist and anti-American critical race theory agenda. Adding to the scandal is that we had to file a federal FOIA lawsuit because the agencies are in cover-up mode over this shocking abuse of power. NEW CDC RECORDS DETAIL AGENCY HEAD WALENSKY WANTED DETAILS OF DEATH OF TEENAGER REPORTED TO VACCINE ADVERSE EVENT REPORTING SYSTEM Many Americans are concerned about side effects of the COVID vaccines and, it turns out, so are the bureaucrats dictating that we get it. We obtained 314 pages [==] of records from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention that show Director Rochelle Walensky’s communications, which include her request for details about the death of a teenager who died days after receiving a coronavirus vaccination. We obtained the records in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request sent on September 9, 2021, for: All emails sent to and from CDC Director Rochelle Walensky referencing the terms ‘Antibody Dependent Enhancement’, ‘ADE’ (when used to represent Antibody Dependent Enhancement), ‘pathological priming’, ‘pre-priming’, ‘paradoxical immune enhancement’, and/or ‘disease enhancement’. On June 28, 2021, Walensky forwarded an article [==] titled “CDC reportedly probing Michigan teen's death after COVID-19 vaccination” to her subordinates, asking, “Any details on this?” Dr. Henry Walke, director of CDC’s Division of Preparedness and Emerging Infections, forwarded Walensky’s request to another official, David Fitter, who replied, “The case had been reported to VAERS [CDC’s Vaccine Adverse Event Reporting System [==]]. CDC has spoken with ME [Medical Examiner], but we are following protocol for f/u [follow-up] re the case. Additionally, CDC remains in contact with MI to assist in the investigation.” CDC official Jennifer Layden followed up the same day, writing: For awareness, further details. This case was reported through VAERS, and the investigation is proceeding. From safety team: CDC is not actively involved in this investigation (i.e., IDPB examining specimens). We have made contact with the state health department and the pathologist who did the autopsy and are in touch to maintain situational awareness. The initial report is in VAERS and we will receive the final autopsy report when it is complete. I can't speak to how the reporter got his/her information and came to his/her conclusions, but this is being investigated at the state level, as are all deaths. The autopsy was completed when we contacted the state health department and no request for CDC assistance has been made. - The patient was a male aged 13 years with no notable medical history. - He was found unresponsive 2 days after vaccination. Aside from a fever, he was in his usual state of health prior to his demise. - An autopsy has been performed; the results and final report are pending. - CDC and the state health department are in communication about this case, which remains under investigation. - The pathologist indicated that there appeared to be bilateral ventricular enlargement and histology consistent with myocarditis, but those were preliminary findings. Walke forwarded this email to Walensky, writing, “More info.” Walensky replied, “Grateful... R”. On August 20, 2021, Christie Bloomquist, an AstraZeneca vice president for corporate affairs, North America, emailed [==] Walensky a press release stating that “The reduced Fc receptor binding aims to minimize the risk of antibody-dependent enhancement of disease - a phenomenon in which virus-specific antibodies promote, rather than inhibit, infection and/or disease.” On July 26, 2021, Walensky received via email a study [==] from a person whose name is redacted titled “Six Month Safety and Efficacy of the BNT162b2 mRNA COVID-19 Vaccine.” According to the researchers, the study included 44,165 randomized participants. “Of these participants, 44,060 were vaccinated with 2:1 dose (BNT162b2, n=22,030; placebo, n=22,030), and 98% received dose 2 (Fig.l). During the blinded period, 51% of participants in each group had 4 to <6 months of follow-up post dose 2; 8% of BNT162b2 recipients and 6% of placebo recipients had 2:6 months follow-up post-dose 2.” The researchers found [==] that: Adverse event analyses during the blinded period are provided for 43,847 ≥16-year-olds (Table S3). Reactogenicity events among participants not in the reactogenicity subset are reported as adverse events, resulting in imbalances in adverse events (30% vs 14%), related adverse events (24% vs 6%), and severe adverse events (1.2% vs 0.7%) between BNT162b2 and placebo groups. Decreased appetite, lethargy, asthenia, malaise, night sweats, and hyperhidrosis were new adverse events attributable to BNT162b2 not previously identified in earlier reports. The study was paid for and conducted by Pfizer and BioNTech. The American people have the right to know as much as possible about the safety of the COVID vaccines, and the CDC needs to be more transparent about its investigations of COVID vaccine adverse events, including deaths, reported on VAERS. ARIZONA CROSSING SEES 2,404.9% HIKE IN ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS OVER LAST YEAR The Biden border crisis is an existential threat to America. Crossing into our land are people from nations all over the earth, and the numbers are staggering, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [=]. As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures []. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September. As the new year gets underway, the numbers are growing at a disturbing rate for the municipality with a population of about 96,000. The city’s mayor recently declared a local emergency [=] due to the humanitarian and border crisis caused by the unprecedented surge of migrants entering the area. During a five-day period in early December, more than 6,000 illegal immigrants crossed from Mexico through the Yuma area, according to U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) figures cited in the mayor’s declaration. “Migrants are traveling through Yuma during a time of great uncertainty about the COVID-19 virus, and without provisions for adequate food, water, shelter, transportation and medical care,” a statement [=] announcing the order reads. “This surge of migrants has and will continue to strain the ability of medical staff and local hospital resources to provide essential and necessary medical care.” In the statement Yuma Mayor Douglas Nicholls says the change in the movement of migrants greatly impacts his community. That includes the area’s agriculture industry because migrants are passing on foot through active agriculture fields. “The encroachment on active production fields results in food safety concerns and the destruction of crops, which leads to significant economic loss and property damage in the farming community, loss of agriculture-related jobs, and a threat to the nation’s food security,” the city emergency declaration states. Yuma is hardly the only Border Patrol sector to start the year with a bang, the government figures show. Around 980 miles away, the Del Rio station in Texas has seen a 237.8% surge in illegal immigrants over the same period last year. Two other Texas sectors—Rio Grande Valley and Big Bend—also report alarming spikes at 166.6% and 118.7% respectively. Other crossings in Texas, California and Arizona have also seen major increases in illegal immigrants in the first two months of fiscal year 2022. San Diego reports an 89.1% boost, Tucson 71.9%, and El Paso 68.5%. Each of the crossings finished fiscal year 2021 with unprecedented gains in apprehensions. Del Rio led the pack with a 542.7% surge while Rio Grande Valley had a 508.7% increase. Big Bend and EL Paso recorded apprehension gains of 331.9% and 256.5% respectively in fiscal year 2021. Most of the illegal aliens, 608,000, arrested by the U.S. in 2021 came from Mexico followed by the Central American nations of Honduras (309,000), Guatemala (279,000) and El Salvador (96,000). Nevertheless, federal agents along the Mexican border are encountering a lot more migrants from nations outside of Latin America, including those with terrorist ties. In fact, thousands of illegal immigrants from Africa and the Middle East were arrested in the first month of this fiscal year, indicating an alarming trend among migrants entering the country through the porous southern border. In October alone, the first month of fiscal year 2022, the Border Patrol’s Del Rio Sector in Texas reported [=] 28,111 illegal aliens from more than 50 countries. They include Syria, Lebanon, Eritrea, Uzbekistan, and Tajikistan, a central Asian nation that borders Afghanistan, which is controlled by the Taliban after the abrupt exit of U.S. troops last year. In November, the station apprehended six nationals of Eritrea, a northeast African country on the Red Sea coast, two Syrian males, a man from Lebanon, home of the terrorist group Hezbollah, two men from Tajikistan as well as a man from Uzbekistan. “We encounter individuals from all over the world attempting to illegally enter our country,” Del Rio Sector Chief Patrol Agent Jason D. Ownes said in late November. “Our agents are focused and work hard to ensure that we detect, arrest, and identify anyone that enters our country in order to maintain safety of our communities.” Until next week ... body:

Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=5ce7e3a683bc41aeb0ce1e9aeed36a19&_e=ayj86jNJjYKBFeGKvwjNRlv3DTpTWXfqJ3uv44XRHBXHieHLPb-AvR1LkwvWf5Ble3rEHJM_5rawToJOlB6OftNytjUsfXsYSdS0j_M1a6Sczp5ptcobpJR-1ZsEcQpYkToy9iKO7_d1GxOKXrcXMUFbnq2ujIPZ6F2vZl8BQEbC-bnImSGwfqKP4Cn-uTsscsNzF9PCObmvhT1R0zcQoQu-nIkHQYg2rlx9PF2aij6Ebefs0xBAu2ic3qm4lVGmXbIUx9504x8K3dltFBo1KpEWi7EnITVo6szyEtdlBEG_JQz4iiocI0gP9jE13uViOH4WGHYmwioQv84g46TqfnDJO__cmoJ2VscozCs2nruEU0zbYUb14SiMTm1B3uCObgJw6MMdb1enN8Y5CdVlja-tk4KIIZvixnzJ0DTsIDwAckE6Tj7hA6K-_8h3Za9mE7HRYIvj9S2C56PAym5IgQ%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=5ce7e3a683bc41aeb0ce1e9aeed36a19&_e=ayj86jNJjYKBFeGKvwjNRlv3DTpTWXfqJ3uv44XRHBXHieHLPb-AvR1LkwvWf5Ble3rEHJM_5rawToJOlB6OftNytjUsfXsYSdS0j_M1a6Sczp5ptcobpJR-1ZsEcQpYkToy9iKO7_d1GxOKXrcXMUFbnq2ujIPZ6F2vZl8BQEbC-bnImSGwfqKP4Cn-uTsscsNzF9PCObmvhT1R0zcQoQu-nIkHQYg2rlx9PF2aij6Ebefs0xBAu2ic3qm4lVGmmJbZ0eHzlfZr4CVXlXf3Yx9CQGGjktBvff7bAkSsbFoJGHopD0Tkn7dsWm37j90_Mp_YlEzlojuCsY6l6lsDEB6-iPu8WntR9Taw5Vb93SfPTZIK9BDbfRL7B5Rao8curUpjLXC7ZoFr21zGHupV5-mx9Rfrbz_gSeDu_BRerZi72el1OjrtB0ObVbC1W4fgyCOozFZXEbUDq4AnZxBb2Q%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

We have a date. Now, it's time to take the fight to Washington. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0c90732b4788/help-build-nathans-momentum-15623230?e=392945c7bc)

| | Peter,

It's official: Gov. Gavin Newsom has set a date for the special election to replace Rep. Devin Nunes.

Voters will get their chance to select his successor on **April 5, 2022** , giving us 88 days to build enough momentum to keep this seat in safe hands.

Why? We _**can't**_ afford to let a radical replacement candidate represent the San Joaquin Valley.

We need a leader who will fight for the Valley's water resources, stop our tinderbox forests from constantly burning down, bring an end to inflation, and strengthen local control of our schools and public safety.

That's why we need Nathan Magsig as our next Congressman.

**Can you help us kickstart Nathan's sprint to April 5?**

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Our goal today, in Rand Paul’s honor →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, today is
Rand Paul’s birthday.

So we need every person reading this email to help send him a special
birthday message he'll never forget.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/rand-paul-birthday-letter/?source=em20220107-2&t=1001&akid=1427%2E346206%2E6eSYbd ]Will you sign our birthday letter to Rand Paul and let him know that
this movement is going to send him to an early retirement?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/rand-paul-birthday-letter/?source=em20220107-2&t=1002&akid=1427%2E346206%2E6eSYbd ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/rand-paul-birthday-letter/?source=em20220107-2&t=1003&akid=1427%2E346206%2E6eSYbd ]SIGN THE LETTER →

Dear Rand Paul,

In honor of your 59th birthday today, I’m sending you this letter to let
you know we will never forget the historic year you’ve had.

From supporting Trump’s lies about a stolen election, to being banned from
YouTube because of your blatant lies — you’ve made it clear to us that
this needs to be your last year in office.

You swore an oath to this country and to the people of Kentucky to protect
our democracy. You have betrayed that oath time and again, and we’ve had
it.

Your top priority has always been you.

That’s why you voted down countless COVID relief bills while both you and
your wife profited off this pandemic.

That’s why for years you’ve been the top recipient of donations from
fossil fuel companies and continue to reject climate action.

That’s why Big Pharma gives you money if you promise to fight against
lower drug prices.

We all deserve better, and I know in my heart that Kentucky deserves
better.

That’s why we’re rising up this election to replace you because the cost
of inaction is too high. There’s a historic movement growing in Kentucky
and we’re going to make sure this is your last birthday in office.

We’ll see you at ballot box,

YOUR NAME HERE!
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/signup/rand-paul-birthday-letter/?source=em20220107-2&t=1004&akid=1427%2E346206%2E6eSYbd ]SIGN THE LETTER →

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, today is Rand Paul’s birthday. So we need every person reading this email to help send him a special birthday message he'll never forget. [ ]Will you sign our birthday letter to Rand Paul and let him know that this movement is going to send him to an early retirement? [ ][IMG] [ ]SIGN THE LETTER → Dear Rand Paul, In honor of your 59th birthday today, I’m sending you this letter to let you know we will never forget the historic year you’ve had. From supporting Trump’s lies about a stolen election, to being banned from YouTube because of your blatant lies — you’ve made it clear to us that this needs to be your last year in office. You swore an oath to this country and to the people of Kentucky to protect our democracy. You have betrayed that oath time and again, and we’ve had it. Your top priority has always been you. That’s why you voted down countless COVID relief bills while both you and your wife profited off this pandemic. That’s why for years you’ve been the top recipient of donations from fossil fuel companies and continue to reject climate action. That’s why Big Pharma gives you money if you promise to fight against lower drug prices. We all deserve better, and I know in my heart that Kentucky deserves better. That’s why we’re rising up this election to replace you because the cost of inaction is too high. There’s a historic movement growing in Kentucky and we’re going to make sure this is your last birthday in office. We’ll see you at ballot box, YOUR NAME HERE! name: Rep. Scott Fitzgerald
subject: PETITION: Let our children learn!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Peter,**Wisconsin schools need to stay open, and they need to put kids first!** If you agree, please, take a moment to sign my petition to DEMAND that our schools put kids first ahead of politics and half-baked mandates. [PETITION: Put Kids First & Keep Schools Open! >>](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-r/) In Chicago, teachers unions and Democrat politicians have successfully CLOSED their public schools and sent parents scrambling.In D.C., shifting goalposts and incompetent leadership from the White House is keeping families in the dark about how to respond. And even here in Wisconsin, the Head Start program is putting kids at a disadvantage by forcing kids as young as TWO years old to adhere to their mask mandate. **We know that mask mandates are detrimental to early child development.****We know that "virtual learning" isn't the same as in-person learning, and students have been struggling with mental-health challenges as a result. ** _So WHY are Democrats and their far-left allies trying to take them out of school AGAIN? _We can do better by our kids, and it starts with your support and your signature.**Please - step up and sign our petition immediately! I look forward to seeing your name.**Thank you,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [SIGN MY PETITION NOW](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-y/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-j/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-t/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-h/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-curdhdt-D494E01E-yuhdluddtl-k) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-u-curdhdt-yuhdluddtl-u/)

If you agree, please, take a moment to sign my petition to DEMAND that our schools put kids first ahead of politics and half-baked mandates. In Chicago, teachers unions and Democrat politicians have successfully CLOSED their public schools and sent parents scrambling.In D.C., shifting goalposts and incompetent leadership from the White House is keeping families in the dark about how to respond. And even here in Wisconsin, the Head Start program is putting kids at a disadvantage by forcing kids as young as TWO years old to adhere to their mask mandate. We know that mask mandates are detrimental to early child development.We know that "virtual learning" isn't the same as in-person learning, and students have been struggling with mental-health challenges as a result. So WHY are Democrats and their far-left allies trying to take them out of school AGAIN? We can do better by our kids, and it starts with your support and your signature.Please - step up and sign our petition immediately! I look forward to seeing your name.Thank you,Congressman Scott Fitzgerald | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 |

name: Larry Elder
subject: We've got a country to save
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
I just launched my new political action committee called Elder for America PAC!
_Sponsored message_
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za65rfs2b4p03q64e18otsudvoo3tqd8ls0dree8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)
---
I have big news, fellow patriot – and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

I just launched my new political action committee called **Elder for America PAC!**

_Why am I doing this?_ **Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines.**

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjopr2m8oe68lrkcqm6c8mvkh06gbd3blbjpuivg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)
Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising **to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms.**

We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education – two key areas where Americans are being failed.

[**I’m reaching out because I cannot do this alone. If you’re ready to join me in the fight to save America, please be among the first to join my team with a Week 1 contribution of $25 or more to support the mission of Elder for America PAC.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvir7rdo3t9cl0k796dr983sev0fpiraae0k78c0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z97lla2gtj8u0sbks71vot8artutqc0oa4jfjgco_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)
The radical left’s woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to ‘progressive’ district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies.

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated.

Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers.

Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist.

**I for one have had enough** , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome.

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z13gkg2teqt36qecld18nn77jv0sfae9r50ln9io_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)
Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country.

[**But to win this fight and others, I need you on my team. Be among the first to throw your hat in the ring with me by making a Week 1 contribution to Elder for America PAC of $25 or more.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsaangf9kphdq0f2absi8tjvheu4d6c7h4mvtkh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)

**We have a country to save** – and with patriots like you on my team, _I know we can!_

Thanks,

Larry Elder

P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. [**Will you stand alongside me in this fight from the beginning?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdla9b0vt4oc5s9gdpamm4nuoelgk3oihpcnhiv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)
Thanks! -Larry

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3qh56hs9u4aj98p4a9mevii75uukl763rbv6l4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4s1h2bs)

| PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
www.elderforamerica.com
---

name: American Update
subject: Be one of the first
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8303%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=LozOsbyg08B0LX1ErIlqhg&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PYanGmmYiL5zW5k7lxfu%2fA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PYanGmmYiL5zW5k7lxfu%2fA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=44VKWc4QbOsVlFR%2frJOsOw&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: course correction starting now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpcjm0rj4inch2n388kclmuevakkj5h3m4ca92fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4sj5chgr4t5icuqr6pjjedin5c5gedj37dr0mdr68or4s6ob0s5ncdp6cd35msrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcc9imdiefcjhcoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zj4824ltpf60n4mob3beg2jo74ehf19466v44c1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs) | |
---
Friend, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zglbhjt41dirc1k2cg952b61op0q6hf2rcisf31g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)**

I know this race won’t be easy — we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don’t succeed.
** **
That’s why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we’re prepared for whatever comes next. I’m pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you’ll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z08hhn3q77vo1u8kherakl24jqondnudpljmtjko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z64kauid8v3hire86elvq8qph00kj4g9m5b2rmv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z20pg1h6momfpsouq3r6bdulidv80nun3ktiklbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd473r7a7ofqve2dc3nbckm3nbng49rb0aq8a8o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You’re already feeling the damage they’ve done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It’s hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we’re recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let’s not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I’m 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zolopfi2rtguq4515e6ulh5703hsn0sehmlugr2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or4c5h2bs)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul
__
|

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc488i7j2bv9qbo8b5no5is559gkkf9qmt8u7ivg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or2c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4opgmdqm3c5gc5hr1ppge4pnatr5ehjm0tpimti7co72chin0o74c8q6epr0e3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8omcc9imdiefcjicoqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5koii2a32f5kipmstfq83ki0333e0qj09hfkiqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or2c9h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbd95oejggu0ksgliqav79ga9i18ifddeg1fpaq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or2c9h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96eis63rbrchl0rl65fhmp3t26qe3h732jl4s2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or2c9h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7cjmcpuqgcnov9tjj320q82bkrp0f3q9artakn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdj69or2c9h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk1taqqt8d1i44sjf9hrsq1o5m0tpqvun2hoc37g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp3corielorep3mmhimacphmgp6csbksor64o3ks1hnas3mmhge3dhj6iob1d30cv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lib6or7m8pmcd74mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5i66ob6c9i62oh5u)

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2o0uk9bjjfg34j00n7kkelvr472l87fjsaerjko_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqslql05i56chje57a8a0d4np2nnbnhua5ff2n2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c5h2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume t
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3ukra5ue24btmc8slctfal3cut92ebe2e4vt6ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c1h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrl6eaemrvmb2kc4j0vahuejn0r4eoa824ncmiro_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c1h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z11b08v2rjkqobhj3chnvcd7aukuimo32jcmrdmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c1h2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z07ief5tl69ree9tat28o0n9dq94fs4nedv35gp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdgmcoj4c1h2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: They're suing to protect free speech
body:
Web Version: https://view.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=d1b731f153413af6289f77e86b905bce75e99acc55aad556e521fe9a26b7543020a3f1254f582c01516b3e4ffca01ca52e0671fad8bd9e138f90fe803c840acbdf6c375f1173ca59dcf1e0fb47e880e6
----------------------------------------

Dear Fellow Patriot,

This was state-sponsored censorship at its finest.

As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely.

Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus.

As someone who’s been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it.

And now I’m urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=2731cdf13c0baccce8320e62667cec6252a3851f08284d5b062bda941768b2c03e3c4f016466fec6acf6a19dafd00eabb1f95e2943e1781d8a0d11c14bbaf3f7
Will you help me?

It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=2731cdf13c0baccce8320e62667cec6252a3851f08284d5b062bda941768b2c03e3c4f016466fec6acf6a19dafd00eabb1f95e2943e1781d8a0d11c14bbaf3f7

The students attempted to host a Young America’s Foundation lecture featuring Dr. Arthur Laffer, Ronald Reagan’s economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas.

But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn’t like that one bit.

On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall—specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. Laffer’s speech.

Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators.

When the day came, Dr. Laffer walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say...

Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.

With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted—drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=2731cdf13c0baccce8320e62667cec6252a3851f08284d5b062bda941768b2c03e3c4f016466fec6acf6a19dafd00eabb1f95e2943e1781d8a0d11c14bbaf3f7

Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event!

Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event—instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer.

It’s bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies.

But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student’s rights.

They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one.

The good news is that my friends at Young America’s Foundation are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America’s Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights.

But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF’s EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders.

https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=2731cdf13c0baccce8320e62667cec6252a3851f08284d5b062bda941768b2c03e3c4f016466fec6acf6a19dafd00eabb1f95e2943e1781d8a0d11c14bbaf3f7
That’s why I’m asking you to help Young America’s Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today.

You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation (YAF) before.

As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country – they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses.

I know from experience.

A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley.

It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn’t want me there.

They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past.

Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was “too dangerous” and “controversial.”

Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending.

And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas.

You see, Young America’s Foundation doesn’t take a single dime from the federal government.

Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you.

And now that they’re standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help.

I am so confident in Young America’s Foundation that I’ve chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances. In fact, through YAF I’ve spoken at 60 colleges and universities!

And it’s not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF’s campus lectures featureNFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder, and Dinesh D’Souza, Katie Pavlich, and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online).

That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important.

One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas.

And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely.
