clean_body: Web Version: Dear Fellow Patriot, This was state-sponsored censorship at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely. Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus. As someone who’s been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now I’m urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions. Will you help me? It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. The students attempted to host a Young America’s Foundation lecture featuring Dr. Arthur Laffer, Ronald Reagan’s economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn’t like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall—specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. Laffer’s speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. Laffer walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall. With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted—drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event—instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It’s bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student’s rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at Young America’s Foundation are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America’s Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF’s EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders. That’s why I’m asking you to help Young America’s Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today. You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country – they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn’t want me there. They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was “too dangerous” and “controversial.” Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America’s Foundation doesn’t take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they’re standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. Will you please send a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75 or more to my friends at Young America’s Foundation and help them defend our First Amendment rights? That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely. name: Jen Kiggans for Congress
subject: Our mission is clear…
body:
Yesterday Elaine Luria has announced her re-election
| | | | [](https://kiggansforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuyuic-yukjlhakt-y/)
---
| | | [](https://kiggansforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuyuic-yukjlhakt-j/)
---

Yesterday Elaine Luria officially announced her run for re-election for Virginia’s Second Congressional District.
There are many words that come to mind when I think about why I am running against her to represent this district in the U.S. House of Representatives. Two of these words are: MISSION and CLARITY.
My MISSION is to ensure America remains the greatest country in the world where we are proud to live and free to contribute to her success. It has become increasingly CLEAR to me how to do this: send a loud message to Elaine Luira and the rest of her radical progressive Democratic party that Americans have had enough.

[HELP ME COMPLETE THE MISSION - DONATE HERE](https://kiggansforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-cuyuic-yukjlhakt-t/)

Our mission is clear... It is time to get the country back on track by restoring our economy, securing our borders, giving parents a voice, and making our communities safer.
But I can’t do this alone. One thing I have learned is that politics is a TEAM sport... and I need you ALL on my team to do this. I’d be honored to have your help!
| | ******In appreciation...******
---
**Sen. Jen Kiggans
**

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Big Tech Targets Conservatives
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| The Silicon Valley Big Tech companies are on a rampage right now -- banning and canceling conservatives like you and me for speaking the truth.
How many friends and family do you know who've been given a "30-day" jail timeout on Facebook or had a WARNING / MISINFORMATION label placed on a post? I venture to guess almost all of us have been victims of a Big Tech crackdown.
When one of my staff members uploaded an interview I did with Lars Larson, YouTube pulled it down because what I said "violated" some sort COVID censorship they employ on their platform.
Just this week, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, a powerful conservative in Washington, DC, was banned from using her personal Twitter account ... forever! If they can do it to her, an elected Member of Congress with 465,000 followers, then they can certainly do it to you and me.
---
|
---
| The good news is, out of this Big Tech censorship we've begun to see far more friendly free speech platforms like GETTR and Telegram develop. I recently opened a Telegram account and just yesterday, I opened a GETTR account as well. I would like to invite you to follow me on BOTH of these platforms.
---
| | | [GETTR](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uStuQbAwan-yZ4d-g1rhlxYFlAgJe-Uj3Am8s8Nwh-BuEciL_i33ZDmCqv1D9PyJ1h1KPoZ8sY2_taJb4pEIQQL_W2Cm7yGdUtQ_ETpg8CPR8dQFgXgDkTx54IBH7J5xi3jUUY3GNKUX3EZgfiF6aMgM7nvn5NLkEfNBDB8Nv0s=&c=65bG8zkz3QegTXCpa4ZKJDDEbp2myi-9ImK6bDFt7N7qNQzIiXaGTg==&ch=a5nfjW4Txbudtds2rSvwMt25mHmWwEs3qlbuqjHv-9gdf1OzkKFGmA==)
---
| | | [TELEGRAM](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uStuQbAwan-yZ4d-g1rhlxYFlAgJe-Uj3Am8s8Nwh-BuEciL_i33ZDmCqv1D9PyJ_I5PU0Lu3YMJyBMg3rP4bZX9VsIOx8QS-DTMdi47Tt-FknnC_RW78U-MpE1Jn0njjBgy-Pi_LYSDEKyfUYfxhw==&c=65bG8zkz3QegTXCpa4ZKJDDEbp2myi-9ImK6bDFt7N7qNQzIiXaGTg==&ch=a5nfjW4Txbudtds2rSvwMt25mHmWwEs3qlbuqjHv-9gdf1OzkKFGmA==)
---
| While I won't be shutting down my [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uStuQbAwan-yZ4d-g1rhlxYFlAgJe-Uj3Am8s8Nwh-BuEciL_i33ZPpCCRKiCnbSj8_txuFEtP9s70694mHkqimXgoGTkrG96P_jaRvgyQ-S_yFZVtX4nTDb4lXMXJ7rlYCu5bDZpenLvJA1obDe-4cVgxJjH51uggLS5oQhYrKTPp3zTfthSw==&c=65bG8zkz3QegTXCpa4ZKJDDEbp2myi-9ImK6bDFt7N7qNQzIiXaGTg==&ch=a5nfjW4Txbudtds2rSvwMt25mHmWwEs3qlbuqjHv-9gdf1OzkKFGmA==) or [Instagram](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uStuQbAwan-yZ4d-g1rhlxYFlAgJe-Uj3Am8s8Nwh-BuEciL_i33ZONwdFzxVwLLJ-XwXv2VnzP5wGY5pqJWmyoMvGHex8U3g6OEp5QqluMo0Icb_IzkA6HAOF9FAfV0m59GyYvUNBcZ0T0BtBT1cPpcMDPX1tUKXCqyZFKShDQS08zKdVMa8g==&c=65bG8zkz3QegTXCpa4ZKJDDEbp2myi-9ImK6bDFt7N7qNQzIiXaGTg==&ch=a5nfjW4Txbudtds2rSvwMt25mHmWwEs3qlbuqjHv-9gdf1OzkKFGmA==) accounts because we've developed incredible followings there, I will be posting similar content on GETTR and Telegram that I post on Facebook and Instagram -- if you find yourself gravitating to those platforms.
History is almost always an accurate indicator of the future. And what we're seeing from the radical left is what they've historically always tried to do to their ideological adversaries -- silence them, censor them, and ban them. I'm expecting it to get even worse. As Southwest Washington's next Member of Congress, I certainly won't forget what Big Tech is doing to conservatives when I'm serving in Congress. Please follow me on GETTR and Telegram just in case the Big Tech censors drop the hammer down on me!
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | The Silicon Valley Big Tech companies are on a rampage right now -- banning and canceling conservatives like you and me for speaking the truth. How many friends and family do you know who've been given a "30-day" jail timeout on Facebook or had a WARNING / MISINFORMATION label placed on a post? I venture to guess almost all of us have been victims of a Big Tech crackdown. When one of my staff members uploaded an interview I did with Lars Larson, YouTube pulled it down because what I said "violated" some sort COVID censorship they employ on their platform. Just this week, Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, a powerful conservative in Washington, DC, was banned from using her personal Twitter account ... forever! If they can do it to her, an elected Member of Congress with 465,000 followers, then they can certainly do it to you and me. | | The good news is, out of this Big Tech censorship we've begun to see far more friendly free speech platforms like GETTR and Telegram develop. I recently opened a Telegram account and just yesterday, I opened a GETTR account as well. I would like to invite you to follow me on BOTH of these platforms. | | | == | | | == | While I won't be shutting down my == or == accounts because we've developed incredible followings there, I will be posting similar content on GETTR and Telegram that I post on Facebook and Instagram -- if you find yourself gravitating to those platforms. History is almost always an accurate indicator of the future. And what we're seeing from the radical left is what they've historically always tried to do to their ideological adversaries -- silence them, censor them, and ban them. I'm expecting it to get even worse. As Southwest Washington's next Member of Congress, I certainly won't forget what Big Tech is doing to conservatives when I'm serving in Congress. Please follow me on GETTR and Telegram just in case the Big Tech censors drop the hammer down on me! | | | | | In The News | == == | == == | Local News | | Right here in Washington, our Socialist Governor, Jay Inslee, is proposing legislation to criminalize speech! == | | | | | | == | | | == | Stay up to date at == | | | | | | == | | | | | == | == == | | | | | Friends of Heidi St. John for Congress | PO Box 2828, Battle Ground, WA 98604 | | Sent by mailto:heidi@heidistjohnforcongress.com powered by

body:
One year ago, the United States was still reeling from the events of America's first presidential coup, led by none other than Donald Trump, encouraged by the Treason Caucus, and enacted by followers of the Big Lie. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40475392/324517982/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZWQzODRjLThiNzAtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tIp_UY-IfL-USz23hNpsXRzg4zwIGjn5DdSifCtXHew=&emci=6adfb7d0-0270-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=70ed384c-8b70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001) **Team,**

One year ago, the United States was still reeling from the events of America's first presidential coup, led by none other than Donald Trump, encouraged by the Treason Caucus, and enacted by followers of the Big Lie. Despite an insurrection, we recognized the certification of the 2020 presidential election, and it was a testament to the strength of our democracy.

But here's the thing, we can't let our democracy fall into the danger of being overturned ever again. This was the first time in our lives that we saw insurrectionists climb the walls of our Capitol and nearly succeed in reversing a free and fair election.

**It is our mission that this will be the last time any American will ever have to witness what we saw last year.**

Yesterday, President Biden tweeted:

**"Last year, for the first time in our history, a president who just lost an election tried to prevent the peaceful transfer of power as a violent mob breached the Capitol. But they failed. And on this day of remembrance we must make sure that such an attack never happens again."**

We are grateful to have a president who will not only stand for the American values of justice and accountability, but who will also decisively look to the future and make sure this never happens again. He is right: we must remember January 6 and stand up for our country.

**[Will you take a moment and join us in demanding accountability from the Treason Caucus for the events on January 6, 2021? If so, add your name today, and become a part of our team!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40475393/324517983/926795516?ms=em22_220107_JBWR_adv_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220107_JBWR_adv_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220107_JBWR_adv_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220107_JBWR_adv_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=kZqg6YYiufauGS3GlCGK1dSRxYhyeXsERto1avhEI%2FDrKpf4woNZkmTLwfAVO8At9tbp4v4J08U7NO%2BcEnVNa4Buyccqn4yiGsOn4V8aB6GMBSFzNqaPIDmM6PTF3a9Vq8OCuiU9mRr8J5jR8%2FksWw%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwZWQzODRjLThiNzAtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tIp_UY-IfL-USz23hNpsXRzg4zwIGjn5DdSifCtXHew=&emci=6adfb7d0-0270-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=70ed384c-8b70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001)**

body:
| It's officially election year Ohio Democrats.

Everything we've been building toward over the last year will be on the line this November, and we need to be ready for whatever happens on Election Day.

With less than 12 months to continue organizing Ohio and building the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue, we need a sustainable base of support to keep fighting every single day. So, we've set a goal of recruiting 100 more recurring donors this month -- and we're asking you to become one of them.

[**We're counting on you. Will you help build the foundation to flip Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, and elect Democrats at every level by committing to a monthly recurring donation now through Election Day?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40475412/324518084/-1950535769?refcode=em22_220108_recurr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220108_recurr_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2VkMzg0Yy04YjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2aIDPivo7q5PJy3nYeuuPytKLrTjqz8BvmQzkc3f6fw=)

clean_body: | It's officially election year Ohio Democrats. Everything we've been building toward over the last year will be on the line this November, and we need to be ready for whatever happens on Election Day. With less than 12 months to continue organizing Ohio and building the infrastructure we need to flip Ohio blue, we need a sustainable base of support to keep fighting every single day. So, we've set a goal of recruiting 100 more recurring donors this month -- and we're asking you to become one of them. = = = Your continued support is absolutely crucial -- and a key part of our 2022 victory plan. Monthly donations provide the foundation we need to support Democratic candidates up and down the ticket, talk to voters in every corner of the state, and provide volunteers with supplies. We have a real shot at flipping Ohio blue this year -- and all eyes will be on our state to see if we can pull it off. But we can only win if grassroots supporters like you continue building the infrastructure we need for a blue Ohio. = Thank you for doing your part, \-- Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio. = | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **Thank you for all of your support last year, Peter.**

Because of you, I was able to fight even harder to defend the rights of the voiceless and vulnerable. In 2021 alone, I brought even more lawsuits against the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the Trump family – all to hold them accountable for the harms they have caused to people across our state and nation.

Without the tireless support from you and our other fearless fighters in 2021, I wouldn’t have had the resources to continue my fight to secure justice, progress, and equality for all New Yorkers. As I work to hold the powerful accountable and fight for reelection this year, I’m setting even more ambitious goals for us to reach together. And I need to know: [**Can I count on your monthly support?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40475633/324519056/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk272-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTZmMzQwMC04YzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sPLdMEITz5jlmZV6ySp7KQRPxzkE5p-gmr2mYIX3MXE=)

Thank you again for making all of our important work possible. You helped us transform lives in 2021; now it’s time for us to roll up our sleeves and continue our great work in 2022.

Letitia

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480527/324533475/1927938479?refcode=20220107_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzljZDczOS05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMgubBTLkWQso_7vGpGdnKwGq0Ok8jumdiq88yt2luw=)
Friends — I have an important ask to make, and Seth Moulton said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: [**If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 100,000 contribution goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480528/324533476/1927938479?refcode=20220107_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzljZDczOS05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMgubBTLkWQso_7vGpGdnKwGq0Ok8jumdiq88yt2luw=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480529/324533477/-1534947712?refcode=20220107_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzljZDczOS05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KMgubBTLkWQso_7vGpGdnKwGq0Ok8jumdiq88yt2luw=)
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2022 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, —Mark Kelly

Hello,
**Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls Ann Selzer “the best pollster in politics.”** Why? She knows Iowa better than anyone, overseeing almost every one of the Des Moines Register’s Iowa polls since 1987 – and she has a track record of nearly always being right.
That’s why this is such incredible news for Democrats: **Ann Selzer just told PBS that “there is something going on” in her latest poll and that she sees “weakness” for Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley in her new numbers!**
Admiral Mike Franken is the Democrat running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue, and if Mike wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold onto (or expand!) our Senate majority this year.
But Mike needs your help. **Right now, we’re still 192 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to try to defeat Mike and turn the Senate red. But Mike Franken’s not taking money from corporate PACs so if he’s going to win, he needs grassroots donors like you to chip in now:
[**No amount is too small. Please, will you give $5 or more right now – whatever amount you can afford before midnight tonight – to help Admiral Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480804/324535343/-42398318?refcode=em20220108am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJlNTBhNC05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZftgEM9VRVAQPEA7aSk_YicpYUEqVtgUg3G0SsBjAwY=)

name: Jasmine
subject: I’m running for Congress to replace insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480936/324535566/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDJlNTBhNC05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2AKngBEwnWW4Qgg3xbYDfrBDgYybBkXgf-_vDF0bi0=)

| | Peter, A year ago, I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th – after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials. He made it clear he isn’t fit to serve in Congress. Now, Cawthorn is attempting to orchestrate an extremist, far-right takeover of North Carolina, and Western NC is ground zero of this effort. We have a responsibility to replace his divisive, toxic brand of politics, because it neither represents who we are in Western North Carolina, nor meets the urgent needs of our district. **I know there’s another path forward for us.** It’s a path that will be built by organizing in every corner of our district, that will bring people together around a common purpose, and that will lead us to victory in November. A year from now, I plan on representing Western North Carolina in Congress by focusing on love, empathy, and doing what’s right. That’s why we are building a campaign that is rooted in organizing. That means meeting people where they are, talking about the issues that mean the most to them, and doing a whole lot of listening. People want real results that improve their lives, not to be used as a launch pad for the political careers and ambitions of people like Madison Cawthorn, or Mark Meadows before him. As an organizer and elected official, I have the experience of addressing pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for working families. That’s how we’ll win this district, but it will take all of us to do it. [**So, I have to ask: Will you donate $25 or more to help us replace insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn and forge a new path forward for Western North Carolina?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480937/324535567/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220108_FR_Jan6Resend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDJlNTBhNC05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2AKngBEwnWW4Qgg3xbYDfrBDgYybBkXgf-_vDF0bi0=) | | | [Chip in $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40480938/324535568/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220108_FR_Jan6Resend_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDJlNTBhNC05MzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z2AKngBEwnWW4Qgg3xbYDfrBDgYybBkXgf-_vDF0bi0=)

clean_body: | = | | Peter, A year ago, I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th – after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials. He made it clear he isn’t fit to serve in Congress. Now, Cawthorn is attempting to orchestrate an extremist, far-right takeover of North Carolina, and Western NC is ground zero of this effort. We have a responsibility to replace his divisive, toxic brand of politics, because it neither represents who we are in Western North Carolina, nor meets the urgent needs of our district. I know there’s another path forward for us. It’s a path that will be built by organizing in every corner of our district, that will bring people together around a common purpose, and that will lead us to victory in November. A year from now, I plan on representing Western North Carolina in Congress by focusing on love, empathy, and doing what’s right. That’s why we are building a campaign that is rooted in organizing. That means meeting people where they are, talking about the issues that mean the most to them, and doing a whole lot of listening. People want real results that improve their lives, not to be used as a launch pad for the political careers and ambitions of people like Madison Cawthorn, or Mark Meadows before him. As an organizer and elected official, I have the experience of addressing pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for working families. That’s how we’ll win this district, but it will take all of us to do it. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being all in with us, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: We need to talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bo Hines for Congress_**
body:
Peter:

I'm proud to let you know I'm endorsing **100% pro-Life** , **100% pro-Second Amendment** , and **100% pro-Trump** Bo Hines for Congress in North Carolina.

Ever since I entered Congress, I've been the number one target of the hate-America left that wants to turn our great country into a socialist nation.

Nancy Pelosi kicked me off my committees and tried to expel me from Congress because I refused to play the swamp's games.

**And right now, I need some backup.** **[STAND WITH BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r)** If Republicans lose this next election, the Jihad Squad, Joe Biden, and the rest of the Democrats will slam the pedal to the mettle on imposing their communist agenda on America.

**Radical Democrats will grant amnesty to tens of millions of illegal aliens, pack the Supreme Court with lunatic leftist judges, and ram the _$93,000,000,000,000_ Marxist Green New Deal into law.**

You and I cannot afford to blow the 2022 midterm election by nominating a bunch of Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger-style RINOs that just want to impeach Donald Trump and parrot Nancy Pelosi talking points.

**[So please join me in supporting Bo Hines's campaign for Congress in North Carolina by chipping in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r).**

Bo Hines is the type of America First fighter you and I need in Congress.

Bo saw firsthand how woke fascists took over college campuses imposing cancel culture to silence anyone that stood up to their socialist agenda.

When Democrats, their allies in Silicon Valley, and the fake news media rigged the 2020 election Bo Hines called out the fraud.

**Bo Hines is not afraid to take on the tough fights.**

And Bo Hines knows putting America First means always going on offense.

Polls show a red wave building across the country.

But the pro-Trump movement can only take our country back by electing conservatives dedicated to the America First agenda.

**[That's why I need your help to send the 100% pro-Second Amendment and 100% pro-Trump Bo Hines to Congress by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r).** **[SUPPORT BO HINES
CHIP IN $17.76 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r)** You and I need fighters in Congress now more than ever.

**Establishment RINOs sat in silence when the Big Tech censors banned President Trump and me from social media.**

Elites just want to maintain their membership in the club.

Big Tech really isn't after me.

You are the true target.

Party leaders won't fight for you.

**But I know Bo Hines will.**

That's why I'm asking the Donald Trump movement to support Bo Hines for Congress by chipping in your most generous contribution right away.

The Biden regime declared parents that protest abusive mask mandates and Marxist critical race theory as domestic terrorists.

Adam Schiff, Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and the rest of the Pelosi puppets on the Stalinist January 6 witch hunt committee want to shred the rights of Trump supporters by seizing their phone records and locking them up in prisons for committing the "crime" of voting for Donald Trump.

**I ran for Congress because I was sick of weak Republicans that refused to fight for President Trump's America First agenda.**

I won because of your support.

And I'm asking you to join me in helping Bo Hines become the latest America First Patriot to join Congress.

**If Bo Hines wins in 2022, I know I can count on Bo Hines to help me:**

*** _FINISH_ building Donald Trump's wall;

*** _DEFEAT_ the Democrats massive power grab to rig elections by injecting massive levels of fraud into every election;

*** _DEFEND_ the lives of the unborn by defunding Planned Parenthood;

*** _FIRE_ Dr. Fauci and hold him accountable for funding coronavirus research in Communist China and;

*** _SUPPORT_ the Second Amendment and oppose every unconstitutional gun grab.

**Bo Hines is the 100% pro-Life, 100% pro-gun, and 100% pro-Trump candidate in his race for Congress in North Carolina.**

Saving America and stopping socialism starts by electing an America Frist majority in 2022 that will always fight for you.

**[That's why I'm asking for you to support Bo Hines in his campaign for Congress by chipping of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or what ever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r).**

Sincerely, Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59449352:W6xY5-HFN:m:1:2365227053:E650C0B6B6846A93A8BCBC911F1A16C3:r)
---

name: Tom Perez
subject: Fighting for our democracy
body:
Thursday marked one year since insurrectionists emboldened by Donald Trump threatened the very fabric of our democracy.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40483465/324546717/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220108-Filing-Deadline-2-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ2MzFkNS05NzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsYUThd5hAopzNtcBjEu5A-BvWKwS4MM99PuVWoAM7k=)
Team,

Thursday marked one year since insurrectionists emboldened by Donald Trump threatened the very fabric of our democracy.

A year later, Republican-controlled state governments across the country have continued to rig legislative maps in their favor and introduced an unprecedented number of voter suppression bills, making it more difficult for people to meaningfully participate in our nation's most sacred right.

All of this points to one major fact: **We are fighting for the soul of our democracy in 2022** – and Democratic governors represent our best chance at protecting our progressive values nationwide, especially here in Maryland.

With enough resources, I know we can make it through the primary, win in November, and send the message that far-right politics have no place in Maryland – but we can't do it without your support. **_[Our first public filing is in a matter of days, and we're still short of our 1,500 contribution goal. Please chip in now to demonstrate the strength of this campaign and protect and advance our progressive goals.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40483467/324546718/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220108-Filing-Deadline-2-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ2MzFkNS05NzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsYUThd5hAopzNtcBjEu5A-BvWKwS4MM99PuVWoAM7k=)_**

| **[Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40483474/324546731/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220108-Filing-Deadline-2-ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ2MzFkNS05NzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsYUThd5hAopzNtcBjEu5A-BvWKwS4MM99PuVWoAM7k=)**
---
**Look, our road to victory won't be easy.** Republicans have won the governor's office in three out of the last five elections, and Donald Trump is already trying to carve out a foothold in Maryland, throwing his support behind a far-right insurrectionist in the Republican primary – a move that will almost certainly flood the state with outside cash.

**That's why it's so important that we hit every single one of our fundraising goals – starting with our first public filing next week.** Shoring up resources now means we have the ability to run a winning campaign. It means we can quickly get to work building a Maryland where a parent's income no longer determines their child’s access to opportunity, where workers have a voice, where safe, affordable housing is a human right, and quality health care is no longer out of reach.

**_[So, I'm asking for your $10 ahead of our filing deadline on January 12 – every dollar donated demonstrates the strength of our campaign to the public, and gets us one step closer to fighting for Marylanders in Annapolis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40483475/324546733/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220108-Filing-Deadline-2-ND&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ2MzFkNS05NzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsYUThd5hAopzNtcBjEu5A-BvWKwS4MM99PuVWoAM7k=)_**

Thank you for believing in me, and for investing in this campaign. I can't do it without you.

– Tom
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40483476/324546736/-1884169283?refcode=bpi-em-20220108-Filing-Deadline-2-ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ2MzFkNS05NzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZsYUThd5hAopzNtcBjEu5A-BvWKwS4MM99PuVWoAM7k=)******

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: The Future Of Sheridan.Church & Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
FAQ: What Is The Future Of Sheridan.Church & Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer? Much has changed at Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK over the last year. Currently
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1529.1.e6184bf1279de91243ef0fc5a34843e6)
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1530.1.575bf37d5f6d16079faa51379595bbf3) |
---
## FAQ: What Is The Future Of Sheridan.Church & Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer?
---
Much has _changed_ at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1531.1.0e5c53bee6c66dcb5367963c6cefdf51) in Tulsa, OK over the last year. Currently, the church is **busting at the seams**. Nearly every seat is full and every parking spot is taken (_this is a great problem_). Our online church has grown by several thousand members over the last year as well. However, I get asked quite often **what are the future plans of[Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1532.1.8366889c8380767d8a0aa864b14296a2) and what are the future plans of Kendra and I?** The short answer is: **FULL STEAM AHEAD** because I have _NO_ plans on leaving [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1533.1.8d1e90349e209d62068e7e8e2c0a4bd9). But... _I need your help_. We have maxed out our current location with one Sunday service. I would like to _begin a second Sunday service at[Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1534.1.9b73f90e26aa546ec3cfef83f8dbd2f0) in 2022_ as well as start raising funds to move to a larger location. In order to accomplish this, we will need to fill the second service up by making a marketing push while simultaneously raising the funds to move to a new venue. [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1535.1.7b188faa8f8b398ed4d70b8d2054eb48) needs **YOUR** help. The marketing push to fill the second Sunday service will consist of church members inviting friends and family to [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1536.1.3b6565cc95fca64e5878eddce513712c) on a Sunday through printed material as well as the church running advertisements through digital marketing to reach more people. Upon filling up two Sunday services at our current location _that will position us_ to be ready to enter into a new location. To get started _we need to raise around $45,000_ to cover the cost of starting a second Sunday service, upgrading our online software to stream it and making the necessary push to fill that service through a digital marketing campaign and printed materials. I would like to ask you to help us reach more people with the Gospel by sowing a seed. You can make a donation towards this effort by going to [www.sheridan.church/give](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1537.1.8a621f828e2201a2059ec6b643cdfffc) and in the comment section put the word "Future" so we know the purpose of the gift. I believe 2022 is going to be an incredible year at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1538.1.48dadf240bea184775176267ebae68e2) if each of us will invest our **TIME, TALENT & TREASURE** in advancing the Kingdom of God. I want to invite you to join me tomorrow for our 11AM CT service as I will be doing something very unique tomorrow. Location: 4121 S Sheridan Rd Tulsa, OK 74145 You can watch online through Facebook or YouTube: [www.facebook.com/SheridanCC](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1539.1.dab7fc75347e6ca2766432ae31cbeae7) [www.youtube.com/c/sheridanchurch](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1540.1.9cce7c826bc0f604039db1da0c60cdf1) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1541.1.7c36dbfb1d1159e586b4777168872983), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1542.1.2ddee96080fcf9d0cc5b929f7023e55c), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1543.1.bf6f29662fe113fa9f6e45f6335347ae), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1544.1.ea21b31542297456ade45f586d870adb), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1545.1.772da461383c85710a5a159acf227ac0)).
---
| | [ Click Here To Support The Future Of Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2500225.1546.1.7b2b13111fa3f97265b773578a92b480)
---
---

name: James Carville
subject: I'm asking every Democrat, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I know Val Demings. She has what it takes to win.
| | |
---
**I NEED you to read this, friend!**
**Florida's Senate race could determine whether Mitch McConnell wins back Senate control.** Democratic challenger Val Demings is currently neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so I'm calling on every single Democrat reading this email to throw their _full support_ behind her _._
I'll be blunt: Flipping Florida isn't going to be easy, and the GOP Senate campaign arm has already raised over $25 MILLION to keep Florida red and retake Senate control. **Even worse, Donald Trump is making Florida ****the de facto HQ for the GOP**** and wasted no time giving Rubio his "complete and total endorsement." **

clean_body: It’s no secret that the Republican Party lauds our opponent, Ron Johnson, as an immaculate figurehead who isn’t afraid of “speaking his mind.” | | = = Peter, It’s no secret that the Republican Party lauds our opponent, Ron Johnson, as an immaculate figurehead who isn’t afraid of “speaking his mind.” From questioning the effects of climate change to downplaying the January 6 insurrection, Ron is no stranger to scandal. But there’s something he’s said recently about COVID-19 that’s really rubbed us the wrong way: “We all hoped and prayed the vaccines would be 100% effective, 100% safe. But they’re not. We now know that fully vaccinated individuals can catch Covid, they can transmit Covid. So what’s the point? ” – Ron Johnson on Fox News Primetime What’s the point , Ron? We have a generation of adults who have lived through three major U.S. crises – 9/11, the Great Recession, and now COVID-19. The point is that getting the vaccine means you genuinely care about the health of your community – strangers, neighbors, friends, just to name a few. But this isn’t about Ron spreading misinformation about the vaccine. It’s how our elected officials like Ron would rather spend their time on primetime television with political pundits instead of doing their jobs – being a public servant to the people. We don’t have to settle for Ron Johnson this November, Peter. Look, we’re not going to sugarcoat it – we need a strong grassroots team to win this November. And your contribution today will send a message to Ron that we’re going to win this election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Onward, Team Lasry | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. | While the Supreme Court debates this terrible policy, I am working on legislation in Congress that would help defeat this vaccine mandate.
Since Joe Biden implemented his unconstitutional vaccine mandate, I've fought back. I introduced the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act, which would prohibit the federal government from requiring proof of vaccination or the use of a vaccine passport to engage in interstate commerce.
I pushed back on Department of Defense leadership punishing our service members who choose not to receive a COVID-19 vaccine.
And I helped introduce legislation for Congressional disapproval of Biden's vaccine mandate, making clear that this mandate will have no force or effect.
I will continue to fight back against this vaccine mandate until it is thrown into the trash heap of history where it belongs.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter- Dan Crenshaw here. This week, I called out Joe Biden's year-long failure on the southern border that has caused the worst illegal immigration crisis in decades. I also continued to call on the Supreme Court to overturn Joe Biden's unconstitutional vaccine mandate and renewed my commitment to do everything in my power to fire Speaker Pelosi and take back the House in November. As always, thank you for your support and please stay up to date with me on ==, ==, and ==. Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | 1 YEAR OF THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS | == | == | Joe Biden started his administration by rolling back President Trump's policies that were working to secure our border. What have we seen as a result? The worst illegal immigration crisis in decades. Illegal immigrants have flooded across Texas's border into the United States since Biden took office. Countless illegal immigrants have been released into the interior of the United States, the majority of which will never show up for a court date. And Joe Biden is doing nothing to stop it. | | | == | What's worse? Deadly drugs like fentanyl are also spilling across our borders uncontrollably as a result of this border crisis, killing Americans. Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death - surpassing COVID - for Americans between the ages of 18 and 45. We need to secure our border and shut down illegal immigration. We do this by re-implementing President Trump's policies like the Remain in Mexico program, asylum cooperation agreements with the Northern Triangle countries, and basic enforcement of our immigration laws. We also need to impeach Biden's Homeland Security Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, for purposefully failing to do his job of securing our homeland. I will continue my pressure campaign to ensure our border is secure and those responsible for this border crisis are held accountable. | | | == | | | | | | | | TIME TO RIP THE VACCINE MANDATE APART | | | The Supreme Court is hearing arguments this week in the case against Joe Biden's vaccine mandate. This case should be easy for the Supreme Court - this mandate is clearly an unconstitutional assault on our medical freedoms. | | | == | While the Supreme Court debates this terrible policy, I am working on legislation in Congress that would help defeat this vaccine mandate. Since Joe Biden implemented his unconstitutional vaccine mandate, I've fought back. I introduced the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act, which would prohibit the federal government from requiring proof of vaccination or the use of a vaccine passport to engage in interstate commerce. I pushed back on Department of Defense leadership punishing our service members who choose not to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. And I helped introduce legislation for Congressional disapproval of Biden's vaccine mandate, making clear that this mandate will have no force or effect. I will continue to fight back against this vaccine mandate until it is thrown into the trash heap of history where it belongs. | | | == | | | | | | | | OUR OPPORTUNITY TO FIRE NANCY PELOSI | | | We've seen what one year under total Democrat control can do to our country. Inflation is skyrocketing. Energy prices are at an all time high. There is an unprecedented crisis at our southern border. And Joe Biden is implementing unconstitutional vaccine mandates with zero accountability. The good news? In 10 short months, we have the opportunity to FIRE Nancy Pelosi and take back the House of Representatives. This is our one opportunity to stop Biden's socialist agenda in its tracks. We can't let it pass up. I'm going to devote all of my resources - your donations - to seizing this opportunity to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House. Here's how we do it: ✅Expose the truth about the radical socialist agenda being pushed by Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats ✅Provide alternative, commonsense policy solutions that address the real problems Americans are facing ✅Recruit and support quality conservatives across the country that will win the swing districts we need to take back the House Every dollar you donate to my campaign will go directly to those objectives. I cannot do this alone. But with your help, we can take back the House and start to reverse the damage that's been done under this administration and Democrat control of Washington. Are you ready to get in the fight? There's no time to waste. | | | == | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS FOX: == DAILY WIRE: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == Thank you for reading! In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | | Thank you for fighting for our conservative values. body:
In 2022, we need to elect Nikki Budzinski to Congress.
#
Peter:
Nikki Budzinski is all about fighting for working families.
That’s why I endorsed her. She has raised impressive early funds fueled by grassroots supporters in Central and Southern Illinois. Her supporters have put her in a strong position to run a winning campaign.
**[But the work is far from over. We still need you, Peter. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to ensure Nikki Budzinski is elected in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40484702/324554540/1264325232?refcode=dd_em_220108_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNWFiMDhlMC05YzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5Ikxeopy5QMykkDI_htN7EqD6Nt4leKO3KOg3vQHLo=)**
Nikki is focused on helping families cope with higher costs, especially prescription drugs, health care, and groceries.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Lexi goes to Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Over the holiday break, I was digging through my drawers to look at some old family photos. And this one was too good to keep to myself. In 2002, I brought my daughter Alexa (Lexi for short) to the Capitol with me for work. She was only four, but already had a better fashion sense than her dad. Right after this photo was taken, we ran into Nancy Pelosi, who was the minority whip at the time. “This is Nancy Pelosi,” I explained. “She’s our whip. If you don’t vote the way she wants, she has a whip.” “Don’t tell her that,” Nancy said, then got down on her knees so she was eye level with Alexa and said: “It’s a candy whip. It’s a candy whip.” (“It’s not a candy whip,” I said to myself.) Twenty years later, Lexi is working in a talent booking agency in New York City, focused on media, fashion and branding, and her taste is still far better than mine. That much has never changed. What’s also remained the same since this photo is my fight in Congress. The North Star that has guided me during my time in Congress is what is best for the next generation. I also want to make my kids proud of what their father did when he had a chance to serve. That’s why I’ve been on the forefront of the fight for our democracy and protecting the right to vote. The right to vote is foundational — the right upon which all others rest. Destroy the foundation, and the walls of our democracy come crumbling down. It’s why I’ve put so much focus on fighting climate change and making transformative investments in clean energy and a new green economy. It’s why I am an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal. If future generations don’t have clean air, clean water, or an inhabitable planet, what’s the point of any of the work we do now? It’s why I’ve fought for universal health care and for Medicare for All. Too many Americans fall through the cracks, can’t afford quality health care, and face bankruptcy to pay for medical bills. It’s obscene, especially in the wealthiest country in the world. It’s why I fight for federal student loan forgiveness. Burying our children with generational debt isn’t sustainable or right. It’s preventing young people from buying homes, starting families, and living happy lives. It took me ten years to pay off my student loans, ten years in which they cost more than my rent. And I was one of the lucky ones. And it’s why I fought so hard to expand the child tax credit, and am fighting to make it permanent. It lifted millions of families out of poverty and cut child poverty in HALF. We have to fight for it. **It is our obligation to leave the world better for the next generation. And as long I’m in Congress, I’m going to fight like hell to do so. If you’re with me in this mission, join me by pitching in $10, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40484725/324554837/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220108_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTQ4NmIwNS05YzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qg9hZ9GmIhFHjycbU3N61R5FtPcGq9GgsXDy-VIPFGU=)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I want you to know who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, it's Abby. First, I want to thank you for being one of my strongest supporters. Having you on my team really does mean the world to me. **So today, I wanted to take a bit of time to tell you more about who I am and why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) for Iowa's Senate seat.**
I come from a working-class family with a proud tradition of service – my mother worked in the public school system and my father is a retired union pipefitter welder. My family couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but they gave me something much better: They taught me that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you always raise your hand and say _“yes.”_**[If you're with me, then chip in a grassroots contribution now and say YES to defeating Sen. Grassley and expanding our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40485016/324556235/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk551-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI2N2M3MC05ZDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1MmGX4fDAOUn2RNa6N1TIcUfjJEs8k8plGmNjscDZ4=)**

Seeing work to be done and _doing it_ is a lesson that's stuck with me my entire life. It's why when I saw that no one was fighting for my community in the Iowa State House, even though I was only 25 years old, I raised my hand and said _"yes,"_ serving my community for four years.
But when my far-right representative voted to repeal the Affordable Health Care Act TEN times _,_ I knew there was more work to be done. Plenty of people told me not to challenge him – he was twice my age and a seasoned Washington politician, while I was a young woman from a working family. But I knew that we needed someone to step up and fight for our communities. **So once again, I said _"yes,"_ and once again, I won – becoming the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.**
While in Congress, there was endless work to do, and endless problems to be solved. **So, I kept on saying _"yes"_ – yes to fighting for small businesses, yes to expanding access to affordable health care, yes to protecting our unions, yes to fighting for working families like the one I came from.**
That brings me to why I'm running for Senate today. You see, when there's a problem facing Iowans, Sen. Grassley says _"no." _**When we ask for real help with skyrocketing health care costs, he says _"no."_ When hardworking union members ask for basic protections and a good quality of life, he says _"no."_**
Enough is enough. Sen. Grassley has turned his back on Iowa's working families, which is why nobody will work harder than me to defeat him and lift up the voices of families like mine in the Senate. But with the campaign arm of Senate Republicans sitting on $30 million to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, I simply cannot win without major grassroots support.
**[So please, tonight, can you say "yes" to](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40485019/324556238/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk551-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI2N2M3MC05ZDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1MmGX4fDAOUn2RNa6N1TIcUfjJEs8k8plGmNjscDZ4=)**[** defeating Sen. Grassley, protecting our Senate majority and fighting for working families by**** making a $5 donation right here and now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40485020/324556239/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk551-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDI2N2M3MC05ZDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1MmGX4fDAOUn2RNa6N1TIcUfjJEs8k8plGmNjscDZ4=)
Thank you for believing in this campaign and saying "yes" to standing up for the values that we both believe in.

With gratitude,

– Abby

clean_body: | | | Peter, it's Abby. First, I want to thank you for being one of my strongest supporters. Having you on my team really does mean the world to me. So today, I wanted to take a bit of time to tell you more about who I am and why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) for Iowa's Senate seat. I come from a working-class family with a proud tradition of service – my mother worked in the public school system and my father is a retired union pipefitter welder. My family couldn’t give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but they gave me something much better: They taught me that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you always raise your hand and say “yes.”= = | | = Seeing work to be done and doing it is a lesson that's stuck with me my entire life. It's why when I saw that no one was fighting for my community in the Iowa State House, even though I was only 25 years old, I raised my hand and said "yes," serving my community for four years. But when my far-right representative voted to repeal the Affordable Health Care Act TEN times , I knew there was more work to be done. Plenty of people told me not to challenge him – he was twice my age and a seasoned Washington politician, while I was a young woman from a working family. But I knew that we needed someone to step up and fight for our communities. So once again, I said "yes," and once again, I won – becoming the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. While in Congress, there was endless work to do, and endless problems to be solved. So, I kept on saying "yes" – yes to fighting for small businesses, yes to expanding access to affordable health care, yes to protecting our unions, yes to fighting for working families like the one I came from. That brings me to why I'm running for Senate today. You see, when there's a problem facing Iowans, Sen. Grassley says "no." When we ask for real help with skyrocketing health care costs, he says "no." When hardworking union members ask for basic protections and a good quality of life, he says "no." Enough is enough. Sen. Grassley has turned his back on Iowa's working families, which is why nobody will work harder than me to defeat him and lift up the voices of families like mine in the Senate. But with the campaign arm of Senate Republicans sitting on $30 million to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, I simply cannot win without major grassroots support. = Thank you for believing in this campaign and saying "yes" to standing up for the values that we both believe in. With gratitude, – Abby | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

Hey friend, I wanted to make sure you saw the invitation my team sent around earlier in the week. On the same day as our campaign’s very first campaign finance deadline, **we’re hosting a New Year Kickoff Celebration** over Zoom to celebrate all we’ve accomplished so far, and prepare for the important work ahead between now and Election Day! name: Defeat Governor DeSantis
subject: In a state like Florida, every race comes down to the wire.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
We're worried |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40485777/324560157/1618807945?refcode=20220108_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDhlMjFlYS1hMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LoqkjAFTjFqyUBlioCglnz_EmDGyMWZEqkBG6oh9cpk=)
---

**Team, we're worried:**
**FIRST** Governor DeSantis won his first race in 2018 by less than _half a point._

**THEN** the Cook Political Report rated this race as “Leans Red,” and polls show Charlie neck-and-neck with Governor DeSantis.

**NOW** Governor DeSantis’ mega-rich Republican allies are spending BIG to try to buy Ron DeSantis the election! They know he’s vulnerable.
With the polls consistently showing a tight race, next November is our chance to kick Governor DeSantis out of office and protect Floridians from his dangerous, divisive politics. **But the margin of victory in the last governor’s race was just 0.4% -- so we’re going to need _everyone_ to do their part to help Charlie win.**

While DeSantis has his army of out-of-state billionaires funding his campaign, Charlie is counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him fight back. **And in a state like Florida where _every_ race comes down to the wire, your donation today could make the difference between winning and losing.**

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: NY AG moves on Ivanka and Donald Trump Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=zW7s3%2BCr4cYKyHt9omoMLuA%2F9I%2BvQSwm&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
There's a legal storm swirling around the Trump family, Friend - and it's about to start pouring.
New York Attorney General Letitia James has issued subpoenas for Ivanka Trump and Donald Trump Jr. - seeking to uncover the truth and bring accountability for alleged wrongdoings in the Trump Organization.
Whether in the White House or Trump Tower, the former President and his family have consistently taken steps to enrich themselves while harming others and threatening our democratic institutions. **Whether it 's in business or in government, we must hold Trump and his family accountable - and ensure they are never again in positions to inflict damage.**
Right now, nearly the entire Republican Party is holding hands with Trump and trying to protect him at all costs. No amount of shady business dealings or attacks on our democratic institutions can loosen the Republican Party from Trump's grip. They are _counting_ on grassroots Democrats like us to look the other way. But I know this movement stands for truth and accountability. **So, in light of these revelations that Attorney General James is investigating Donald Trump 's children, we must keep up the grassroots pressure to uncover the truth.**
**[Click here to speak out and add your name if you agree: Should criminal charges be considered for Donald Trump and his family?](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-TFF?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1123-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fblumenthal-trumpfamilyfraud%3Fcode%3Djtk1123-su-nd)**
Thank you, as always, for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: CollierForTexas.com
subject: No real plan to fix the grid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Folks — When the power grid failed, hundreds of Texans lost their lives and thousands more lost their livelihoods. In the energy capital of the world, we can no longer trust that the lights will turn on. **This is what eight years of Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott have done to our Texas.** Almost a year after the February Freeze, there are _still_ no real plans to fix our state’s rickety power grid. Why? Because corporations made billions when the grid failed. It’s no coincidence that Abbott and Patrick accepted nearly $6 million in contributions from energy companies. Or that they then footed Texas families with the bill for the winter storm — $350 per household. Folks, here’s what we know: We deserve better. And we cannot allow Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. Since Patrick refuses to do right by the people of our great state and deliver them a fully repaired, updated, and modernized energy grid – we’re holding him accountable. clean_body: | Folks — When the power grid failed, hundreds of Texans lost their lives and thousands more lost their livelihoods. In the energy capital of the world, we can no longer trust that the lights will turn on. This is what eight years of Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott have done to our Texas. Almost a year after the February Freeze, there are still no real plans to fix our state’s rickety power grid. Why? Because corporations made billions when the grid failed. It’s no coincidence that Abbott and Patrick accepted nearly $6 million in contributions from energy companies. Or that they then footed Texas families with the bill for the winter storm — $350 per household. Folks, here’s what we know: We deserve better. And we cannot allow Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick to ignore the needs of everyday Texans any longer. Since Patrick refuses to do right by the people of our great state and deliver them a fully repaired, updated, and modernized energy grid – we’re holding him accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for raising your voices. After an amazing December (it was our best month all year), we thought we finally were getting into the rhythm needed to beat Republicans. But just a few days into 2022, and we’re already seeing the rate of donations slow down again. Which is unacceptable, team. body:
Will you add your name?

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40487745/324570172/958816626?source=20220108_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDIxMTFjZS1hYzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOXejkkJPgBhovDCWGjhW-1RaUDU7G5WDHq5qMVxaJw=&emci=39decafe-116f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a42111ce-ac70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=19927889) [**_If 1,000 supporters sign on, I’ll show everyone that I have the momentum to win this important race for Democrats. But if I miss my goal, it’ll be that much harder to get my campaign off the ground. Can I count on your endorsement at this pivotal moment? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40487746/324570173/958816626?source=20220108_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDIxMTFjZS1hYzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOXejkkJPgBhovDCWGjhW-1RaUDU7G5WDHq5qMVxaJw=&emci=39decafe-116f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a42111ce-ac70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=19927889) I made it through my critical End-of-Year Deadline. But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40487747/324570174/958816626?source=20220108_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDIxMTFjZS1hYzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOXejkkJPgBhovDCWGjhW-1RaUDU7G5WDHq5qMVxaJw=&emci=39decafe-116f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a42111ce-ac70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. Endorsements like yours will help me get a running start to lift my grassroots campaign off the ground.

[**_And right now I’m hoping you’ll have my back once more, with your endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40487750/324570177/958816626?source=20220108_em_pet_b1_tony_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDIxMTFjZS1hYzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOXejkkJPgBhovDCWGjhW-1RaUDU7G5WDHq5qMVxaJw=&emci=39decafe-116f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a42111ce-ac70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=19927889)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: They’re trying to bury me in legal battles and fees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
It’s been about 8 months since the FBI’s dawn raid on my apartment.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z13nl5kjcim2chpe0tmonqf8o0na3da4oemtqq68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe8dpj6pjb9cdic9q7cp5gm3i3eork6di6adlkm5qb8sb5edp67ddnmtgn0sr7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lib6or7m9q6cdj0mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5i66or1c3h62oh5u)

It’s been about 8 months since the FBI’s dawn raid on my apartment.
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4mjgm3mc8p60npa5s63skno0ev0u2f0emgjlvho_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
After a year of being targeted by the FBI, it seems 2022 will be no different.
---
At the end of last year, President Trump’s former Chief of Staff, Mark Meadows, was held in criminal contempt of Congress just weeks after the indictment of Steve Bannon.
---
__I then learned Adam Schiff wrote a libelous email about me, suggesting I’ll be his next target. He’s always wanted to take down the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump.__
---
These corrupt government goons are trying to destroy me with a mountain of legal battles and fees, and I need your urgent help fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust — the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund — as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zutgi7rc9hj163ti94m30cmhdi2r0vadj220p18o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)

---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlhme61ir7opantflq8e1898n6pebmg9g7rupjb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z77d19vt0f0fc4obgnmecievlpehkndd12mc2fv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn3ocobevv4mk624h84djsv81bafl8f8v3ut5e40_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z054ujgc8iohsr9it4m9fpagulqcuafpto5luqmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7i52ln3h3421kjmot1moe8tuhba27igq8jptqgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)**
---
As I’ve told Tucker Carlson, I have nothing to hide.
---
_It’s been about eight months since the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment._
---
_If they had dirt on me, you better believe it would’ve been exposed by now. They even SURVEILLED my private communications with President Trump for crying out loud!_
---
That’s what’s so terrifying about what’s taking place.
---
**Innocent citizens like me are being targeted, harassed, and indicted by the federal government despite having committed NO CRIMES.**
---
But in the eyes of the Deep State, we’re guilty of a serious crime: loyalty to a political outsider — President Trump — and his mission to drain the swamp.
---
As Alan Dershowitz has said, we are witnessing tactics that you’d expect from a third-world dictatorship, not the United States of America.
---
Sadly, America’s days as the freest nation in the world may be coming to an end.
---
That’s why I refuse to surrender this battle. It’s not just my freedom that I’m fighting for. Our country’s system of justice rests on the chopping block.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust — the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund — as the Deep State tries to destroy me with endless legal battles and fees.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp42ggg23or5u7h2640drqndosddn4bvrot7m0v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72c5h2bs)

Thank you,

name: Phil, Team Lopez
subject: the next 60 seconds could change the fate of AZ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
---
Checking in here ahead of an important meeting with Marco tomorrow, friend. **I grabbed time with him to review our first official focus group of 2022, but we're still missing 18 responses.**
**This is the most important survey we've ever sent out** , and we only sent it to the most qualified supporters. This team depends on your insight, and now that it's officially the election year, the stakes are getting higher every day. **If we don't hear back from you in time, I won't be able to give Marco the full picture – and we could hand this race right over to extremists like Donald Trump and Kari Lake (R).**
**Your feedback isn't just important – it's urgent. So please, I have to ask:** **[Can you take 60 seconds to answer what you can from this focus group?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40488236/324572276/1155030639?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk380-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2I3ZjU4MC1hZDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JbIFUui8z1YQrFF_FiDyPlAPc_6D2JYDTRazeSi_Kg=&emci=abe9b585-cc6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=23b7f580-ad70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6085109)**
We need all final responses by midnight tonight so I can bring them to my meeting with Marco tomorrow. So please, don't delay.

Thanks,

Phil
Campaign Manager
