From: **marcolopez.com**
Date: Fri, Jan 7, 2022
Subject: Special Invitation: Take our first election year focus group
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40488237/324572277/1155030639?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk380-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2I3ZjU4MC1hZDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JbIFUui8z1YQrFF_FiDyPlAPc_6D2JYDTRazeSi_Kg=&emci=abe9b585-cc6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=23b7f580-ad70-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6085109)
---
Friend, it's here.
**We're now officially in our election year._This_ is the year we flip Arizona blue and defeat the dangerous, growing extremism of the Arizona GOP.** But we're at a critical moment:
While Trump's handpicked GOP candidate, Kari Lake (R), plots to buy her way into the governor's mansion, Marco Lopez (D) is doing what it takes to _earn_ votes and win this election with integrity. The experts know he can do it: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight rated this race a toss-up, and new endorsements are coming through for Marco seemingly every day. **But headlines and endorsements alone won't win this race. Your voice will – which is why we need your feedback right now.**
**Friend, you've been handpicked as a top Democrat to participate in the first official focus group of our election year – and it's essential we hear from you by midnight tonight.****Your input will determine our strategy, and that strategy will decide Arizona's future – so please, look at your record and help us immediately:**
**2022 BLUE ARIZONA FOCUS GROUP | COHORT A**

Peter – I understand that Democrats are tired. We’ve been fighting for democracy and our progressive principles for so long.

We endured President Trump’s long campaign of lies and racism, a painful Election Day, 4 years of his presidency, and even a violent insurrection attempt on our Capitol.

When I first won this seat for Congress in 2012, I never imagined the state of our country and democracy would fall so far.

But my whole life I have been committed to public service and progressive policy – from working as a teacher to being elected to a school board and now as a Congressman.

_And I’m not going to stop now._

**What about you, Peter?**

I have big news, fellow patriot – and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

I just launched my new political action committee called **Elder for America PAC!**

_Why am I doing this?_ **Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines.**

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztbgid9lauvgpii74qibeje1lfqvom12adg43en0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72cjh2bs)
Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising **to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms.**

We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education – two key areas where Americans are being failed.

[**I’m reaching out because I cannot do this alone. If you’re ready to join me in the fight to save America, please be among the first to join my team with a Week 1 contribution of $25 or more to support the mission of Elder for America PAC.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zad22hdd69b2njehggnmt5m0157um012u41cst48_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72cjh2bs)

The radical left’s woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to ‘progressive’ district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies.

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated.

Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers.

Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist.

**I for one have had enough** , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome.

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5hu9jmhvcqsm328n3is5al2q8gotrbf5sso37jo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72cjh2bs)
Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country.

[**But to win this fight and others, I need you on my team. Be among the first to throw your hat in the ring with me by making a Week 1 contribution to Elder for America PAC of $25 or more.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zchjdj7urqoh5ta7n2ao3ikpst8b50lmc70a4qa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72cjh2bs)

**We have a country to save** – and with patriots like you on my team, _I know we can!_

Thanks,

Larry Elder

P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. [**Will you stand alongside me in this fight from the beginning?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcaodgq190s20kajmq8ae4on5qqv0j3en9km0fb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm2o72cjh2bs)

clean_body: I just launched my new political action committee called Elder for America PAC! | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- | I have big news, fellow patriot – and I wanted you to be among the first to know. I just launched my new political action committee called Elder for America PAC! Why am I doing this? Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines. Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms. We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education – two key areas where Americans are being failed. The radical left’s woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to ‘progressive’ district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies. Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated. Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers. Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist. I for one have had enough , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome. Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country. We have a country to save – and with patriots like you on my team, I know we can! Thanks, Larry Elder P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. Thanks! -Larry | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee www.elderforamerica.com If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Underestimated

body:
I was underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40488711/324574771/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDk4ZTczNS1iMTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sk7ykIVLqvRRU_svs5QetUHQ20OqK_mV2VcOVGWZ2Z4=)
When I became a Senator, I was underestimated. The GOP** __** called me the “accidental Senator” and doubted my ability to deliver for Coloradans. Now, I’m running for reelection and this cycle I secured tax cuts for working families; helped keep nearly 4 million kids out of poverty; and secured critical investments in our roads, bridges, and internet infrastructure for Colorado. I was once underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake and this won't be an easy race. The National GOP has raised over $75 million to flip states like Colorado and continue obstructing our progress at every turn. We’re up against Mitch McConnell’s warchest, eight opponents, and soon millions of dollars worth of attack ads. But I’ve seen this grassroots team step up in critical moments, including my last midterm election that I won by a hair. In the months leading up to Election Day, we’ll need to hire and train organizers, quickly respond to attacks, and mobilize voters statewide. Your support makes this election-winning work possible, and giving early goes much farther than a donation made later on in this campaign. I know the true power of this grassroots team. So, I have to ask: Will you start this election year off strong with a $10 donation to my reelection effort? clean_body: I was underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake. | = When I became a Senator, I was underestimated. The GOP called me the “accidental Senator” and doubted my ability to deliver for Coloradans. Now, I’m running for reelection and this cycle I secured tax cuts for working families; helped keep nearly 4 million kids out of poverty; and secured critical investments in our roads, bridges, and internet infrastructure for Colorado. I was once underestimated, so I know doubting your opponents is a mistake and this won't be an easy race. The National GOP has raised over $75 million to flip states like Colorado and continue obstructing our progress at every turn. We’re up against Mitch McConnell’s warchest, eight opponents, and soon millions of dollars worth of attack ads. But I’ve seen this grassroots team step up in critical moments, including my last midterm election that I won by a hair. In the months leading up to Election Day, we’ll need to hire and train organizers, quickly respond to attacks, and mobilize voters statewide. Your support makes this election-winning work possible, and giving early goes much farther than a donation made later on in this campaign. I know the true power of this grassroots team. So, I have to ask: Will you start this election year off strong with a $10 donation to my reelection effort? I’m counting on folks like you to build on the progress we made last year. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you. Let’s build together, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**

name: Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: I'm personally asking you, Derek
body:
Derek,

My Dad will always be my hero. After serving in the Army, he went to work parking cars on the Las Vegas Strip.
He eventually worked his way up to become head of the Las Vegas Convention and Visitors Authority and helped build the city we know today. Dad taught me that with hard work and respect for others, I could overcome any obstacle and accomplish anything.

So I took my Dad’s lessons and dedicated my life to protecting and serving my community. I became Nevada’s Attorney General and took on the Big Banks that preyed on our communities during the financial crisis. Then, I overcame nearly $50 million spent to defeat me by Mitch McConnell and the GOP and became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada to ever be elected to the Senate. I won by just two points.

The fight ahead of us -- to keep Nevada blue and protect our razor-thin Senate majority -- will be even harder. New polling shows me 3 points behind my Trump-endorsed opponent. But with the work ethic I learned from my Dad, and your help, I know we can win.

Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood to defend the Senate majority? CNN is now calling my race a top pickup opportunity for Republicans and new polling shows me losing >>
[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220108_CGVA_CCM]

The truth is, our Senate majority hinges on Nevada and the latest news on the ground is deeply concerning:

FIRST : My campaign started being massively outspent by GOP outside groups: Mitch McConnell’s allies poured over $4 million into attack ads to try and defeat me.

THEN : The Cook Political Report officially downgraded my chances of winning and CNN called me one of the most vulnerable Senators up for re-election.

NOW : Recent polling shows me losing by 3 points, and as of this morning, I’m falling dangerously short of my rapid-response fundraising goal.

I urgently need your help to make up the gap before midnight. Falling short could cost me this race and could cost Democrats the Senate, so please: Can I count on you?

Before our midnight deadline, will you please rush a gift of $25 to split between my campaign and CommonGood so we can win in Nevada and defend our Democratic Senate?

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220108_CGVA_CCM]

Thanks for giving what you can, Derek. Together, I know we can do this.

¡La lucha sigue! The fight continues!

Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto, Nevada

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/be315a6e-f16f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/51eb1bfb-b070-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWViMWJmYi1iMDcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QBYYrxbNeJrBESo_vdB8A959MqjHYFbNQ8ch153Ktlo=&id=108609855 .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: How Can We Make Mississippi Flourish? – update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132218?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The center of economic gravity in America is moving.** For much of the twentieth century, New York, Chicago and California were the country’s major commercial clusters. Now, however, a lot of economic activity has started to shift – and it is heading south.

Faced with high taxes and regulation, many businesses like Tesla have relocated from California to Texas. But it is not just companies. People are on the move, too.

While the population of New York state fell by 300,000 between July 2020 and July 2021, Texas grew by 310,000. **An estimated one percent of Californians left their home state last year, while the population of Florida increased by about the same percentage.**

Georgia and Tennessee might have seemed economically unimportant forty or fifty years ago. Today, Atlanta and Nashville are great business hubs.

**But in this story of southern success, there is one glaring omission: our own state of Mississippi.**

Mississippi is surrounded by states that have benefited from a southward tilt in economic activity. So why is our state not growing the way that Georgia or Tennessee are? If the population of the south is increasing, how come so many young Mississippians continue to move elsewhere to find work?

**At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we believe that the key to economic growth is to have low taxes, light regulation and limited government. **

In order to ensure that Mississippi prospers, we have launched the [**Freedom Agenda for 2022,**](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=cb5a4fd1b5&e=5703353baa) a practical set of steps that we can take to ensure that our state grows.
---
|
---
| Our policy proposals are affordable and realistic. We want to:
* **Abolish the state income tax:** Neither Texas, Tennessee, nor Florida have a state income tax – and they are thriving. Scrapping Mississippi’s state income tax would give our state a badly-needed boost, and give ordinary working folk a tax break.

* **Cut regulation:** Mississippi is burdened by far too many boards, commissions, and states agencies that are constantly pushing new regulations onto everyone else. We have practical proposals to make our state a place where it easier to do business, with one-in-two-out deregulation reform.

* **Enable innovation:** Economic activity is moving to those parts of America where innovation is happening. To ensure Mississippi is a place where innovation can happen, we would like to see so-called "sand box" legislation to enable entrepreneurs to try new ways of doing things without having to get a permit.

* **Education:** If we want Mississippi to have the same living standards as elsewhere in America, we need to address education underperformance in our state. Our Freedom Agenda includes a set of reforms that would improve the life-chances of young Mississippians from every background.

Rather than looking for federal favors and Washington handouts, our **Freedom Agenda** sets out the steps we can take here in Mississippi to ensure our state thrives.
---
| |
---

Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---

---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, The center of economic gravity in America is moving. For much of the twentieth century, New York, Chicago and California were the country’s major commercial clusters. Now, however, a lot of economic activity has started to shift – and it is heading south. Faced with high taxes and regulation, many businesses like Tesla have relocated from California to Texas. But it is not just companies. People are on the move, too. While the population of New York state fell by 300,000 between July 2020 and July 2021, Texas grew by 310,000. An estimated one percent of Californians left their home state last year, while the population of Florida increased by about the same percentage. Georgia and Tennessee might have seemed economically unimportant forty or fifty years ago. Today, Atlanta and Nashville are great business hubs. But in this story of southern success, there is one glaring omission: our own state of Mississippi. Mississippi is surrounded by states that have benefited from a southward tilt in economic activity. So why is our state not growing the way that Georgia or Tennessee are? If the population of the south is increasing, how come so many young Mississippians continue to move elsewhere to find work? At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we believe that the key to economic growth is to have low taxes, light regulation and limited government. In order to ensure that Mississippi prospers, we have launched the a practical set of steps that we can take to ensure that our state grows. | | Our policy proposals are affordable and realistic. We want to: Abolish the state income tax: Neither Texas, Tennessee, nor Florida have a state income tax – and they are thriving. Scrapping Mississippi’s state income tax would give our state a badly-needed boost, and give ordinary working folk a tax break. Cut regulation: Mississippi is burdened by far too many boards, commissions, and states agencies that are constantly pushing new regulations onto everyone else. We have practical proposals to make our state a place where it easier to do business, with one-in-two-out deregulation reform. Enable innovation: Economic activity is moving to those parts of America where innovation is happening. To ensure Mississippi is a place where innovation can happen, we would like to see so-called "sand box" legislation to enable entrepreneurs to try new ways of doing things without having to get a permit. Education: If we want Mississippi to have the same living standards as elsewhere in America, we need to address education underperformance in our state. Our Freedom Agenda includes a set of reforms that would improve the life-chances of young Mississippians from every background. Rather than looking for federal favors and Washington handouts, our Freedom Agenda sets out the steps we can take here in Mississippi to ensure our state thrives. | | Warm Regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | TOP FIVE | | | 1 Opinion: Mississippi 2022 Freedom Agenda \- Read Douglas Carswell | | 2 Bill to Raise Minimum Wage Could Hurt Mississippi Workers and Businesses - Read Matthew Nicaud | | 3 Bureaucracy and Handouts Are Not a Solution to Poverty in Mississippi - Read Matthew Nicaud | | 4 Third-Party Organizations Have an Undue Influence on Mississippi Education - Read Matthew Nicaud | | 5 Freedom Agenda Hopes to Break Down Barriers - Read Stone Clanton | | | BEST OF BROADCAST | Parents Deserve to Know What Their Kids Are Being Taught Click to Watch! | |

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: The Legislature is back at it, again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign to stand up to Beacon Hill's greed and lack of transparency.
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
Today, the state Legislature returns from its winter break and holds its first day of formal sessions for 2022.
It remains to be seen what state lawmakers ultimately will accomplish this year. But we do know a few things:

* Some state lawmakers are [making up to $220,000 a year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po18YoQaEKv6_fvdkUjgVaK9krY6UY10RzAr1cH8h4JZcE9VSuRCdvBOcXXq3HiLlHiZggZtZkr6K_8HhP3gmU3ppYZYm3GkJCIJ3pw04clbidN5S6ts9Rjjgus9zGoHDWhRfzr4nqiKvuXm-8QIjRc3zknXI3RieZwFDlW0Fh1v3l2zu_ZuSPmqtdwE0KWbzpiV9rwd0IipLrFyJ89cIBzBcsguqjyiQPB&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==), and it's likely they'll receive a [hefty pay raise](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po1kahuZ-BvvNlUrKmy6G3NUBrL_mp-wB7nau9nZ1RCYEHaQJA4vrb9WksMFwFAM-sjCja6tEEOF7qPPLK-0bPvOjjo5su6X0qP7QkzU21iXJ4SAXLv3wyz3C_mcZkV2ywoIaOGytY0pOT-U87k7yYeXXvVucTUl672-6p68sO6yIOpBNwPrvFFf9Kpc_nCCQaQf6aFDQm31dE=&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==) soon due to inflation. Meanwhile, the workings of the Legislature remain secluded in a State House that's been [closed to the public for almost two years](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po1O4eJY5iDJaon2QJwgfT1VU5GJA3IFNuNFCKY2rXikNlSHPqfcF8_8b1q80lmDBuV5vSaBeEJK1lWCmWmEP2RfuTyZZ3Opb4bWA_eWo62-eIA4Ab-5S0fe_cDAdpEhPwvUG75FnFa5Oi72xLRkGnKaX6C5-BztM_q0-ogs_XRI1wTb4YqOBbjJv0a1DQADeVcM3tsa003mwssxLPj-Vfo_k79J2zc4zv6BvHRcwRMn6qEgDPEc_zwG1isZP2WIz24rDNyujLYGBIHePtNmOWjdasmj4jmOjcF&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==). And, working families and small businesses across our state are[ struggling to make ends meet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po1GH6eytoOETBY1-J5BIVYWWpOIWSJmQOlY0aCGAdHl6eLLzuKabnl-nhQUFWO26Ep6zeno88i9MocDiPPggwPp2Juvu2nKG9WMFSQ-Zkc4lJfrcH48pHCOUmORbsHFgJjVC6rlA4NaDEbtJbpviayIEldyTthvAG1lQJU6TIAQs-vGNSyzgRXx19MEqt1NuJHEdjjRsvfDsV9Npc-DzDAfQ==&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==) amidst the very same inflationary pressure that allows lawmakers to collect more pay for themselves.

* But, that's not enough to satisfy a Legislature that recently went on a nearly $4 billion spending spree, including funding for many pet projects. Even though FY2021 [revenues exceeded initial estimates](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po1vmHACBgdHKHcsHlIAoqSm-wZBT77zrcST4vWfbt2sGXOPbDm_eISg94lB7dEfMg5ruXHWTa8M1pissMLh49LGpm8cjTusdL070jiAQUDTbp0di53l_f-GLMLr3gBQt8ATVeehhaPLk5gAuk0NtRRU5nDk3Hn2lK27yrufHYv904u3ZaYOxSjEnoD_usxxFFWY-XOSrrR-97AVGuLBW4OFnWWfdugn2CT&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==) by billions of dollars, lawmakers voted overwhelmingly to push a [tax increase proposal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5raU2vyF29po1J7rJhKyqT38FJj5AgbHG83NI-EzucSaFwO5BpXNBd-0IzrAr0ouXBovldDAXCAcU5JMvnvjYzqpUH90GGqWrBMmC77bbGY9vtsj5IyrM1cADItd25g2qUN-hE1ssBRiWIlUFY9-NNxcTfTlO-uMJY4GW6gXLao_Dub7xqlPlcgo5RGPBYyObq-jDB11a9EVaSnxrYiwMLf89Ac1kzIVGOQ==&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==) as part of this year's ballot questions. And, small businesses are bracing for the possibility of future taxes as lawmakers still have not fully-addressed deficits in the state's unemployment insurance fund.

---
Am I missing something? Does this sound like the Legislature has its priorities in line with what most Massachusetts residents want? I think not.
I'm running for Governor to help hold the line. I'll stand up against pressure from the Legislature to spend money and raise taxes. Instead, I will work hard to make sure state policies work to the benefit of hard-working Massachusetts residents, small business owners, and their families.
---
But, in order to get there, I need your help.
If you agree that our next Governor needs to be someone who will stand up to Beacon Hill's greed and protect taxpayers and small businesses, will you please help our campaign? Please consider making a donation today:
---
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CxPs1tUi8RQnDu2q1fR09Bzd29_dbl0aDBrun8U2nywGL0-vUJE5rYBeTZGkki_SLFJdiBR-DrG8p3AlZWXyjJKa7KUpas0PJwBZonR7JIdserXzu1TBGkgXO1SoUbSFoMiHj77EL8BjBVhPIYgfmcQu6ioCBjSPp8yAzSmpn8L-EX_4RWekaw==&c=dIhFD0ftERTQ2TW_JTyY3bwXbx_BNSP7XQEDlHN-ria6xSCW16naIg==&ch=zu6j2Xba9zv9kzv6K-3w1BWKxczC0_qyYn2jArhUoOp87l6nIM7c9A==)
---
---
Thanks, as always, for your support!
---

Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

name: Herschel Walker
subject: New polling has us up by ONE POINT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help.
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Friend,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdkFtPxCAQhX8NfaOhdOnloQ_qslFjvHSN-tYgzFoSoJWyGv31zm5WH0yAZL7DTOYc03EhCt22me0445wVrClK0bI6F6JqCw41Y3hhVZEV88q6fBcBzOQN7CAskAdI2dixthZgKqFKwwqhoGlExVSjioarFWNV5roxpXkh5RnhGzwL6H2E_NOGCCbXk0eWQHk6Qlz0CI7aoJFNAeg82ZDoomgk5Waf_LBM-6iBlOsIH4RXB6SVn5V9CwjnybkT9WDs3iODw-oIF43FyWg1XMp-e3EpbwYph-3ZcHcr6f3d1e3j0MsnBL-jp5AgJGwM2tHrh-1Tv35-ee9RHoKzBoV_cLQGna6_Zb_x03sWOzN_WufsUtWY4tsxRrSc4c7O7r46Up8Tzo9dnB8j4q-mUWrVKEGdbOl3DPIg8Qt809cMf_9OI_KTQU7q9Q-6zZD8)
That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.mail.freedomdefense.net/c/eJxdkM1u2zAQhJ9GulGgVv8HHdyYRgIESWG3KXoSKHJlESAplaIbJE_fteH2UIAksN9wFzuje6iqXHVdanrgADznbV5UHW-yqqq7HLDhnC6WdVJyJ43NpoCoF6dxQr9h5jGmcz-iajhMLeTQllXBNc_HfCxhbDWXsqxS288xrltS7BI40NlQXQJm78YH1JlaHLGI0rEZw6ZmtMx4RWzxyNbF-Mg2yUJSHC7RDdtyCQqTYh_wdwL1FSnpVmnOnuC6WHunDrW5OGJ4XZ3gpqi4G62HR3E8PTyK50GI4bQbXl8E-_r69PJtOIo3An9HLz6ij9TolWUy_vyxO53b7xPJg7dGk_AfnI0mp_tPcTy45Vcaer2-G2vNVjeU4vkWI1lOaWdrpo8-ab4kALcugFtEMOqWcmtlxazo2Gfw4irBA73xY8V__-4jsrtBSJr9H1aAkZU)**

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Friend, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right – NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia – 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can – and will – happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team Flowers
subject: There’s a real chance Marjorie Taylor Greene could lose in 2022
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532
Rome, GA 30162
United States

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I hope you’re having a great day so far.
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvut5lphbj1lg9vi566up5noakc2h3vfrcmv7dmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm1ob4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd42i319p18totqatnn01m06sjq1vf5mu1jknlc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm1ob4cth2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za0m4n94odbok6c48nkckgbckuoppg3i8qq5107o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdhm1ob4cth2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

Matt is counting on all of us. | **_CNBC:_** **“Joe Manchin says he has had no talks about resurrecting Biden’s Build Back Better plan”** The Build Back Better Act won’t just tackle the climate crisis head-on — it’s the perfect jumping-off point to solve this existential threat. There’s no time to sit on the sidelines and wait! **[That’s why Matt is counting on 1,000 supporters to sign our petition and demand the Senate pass the Build Back Better Act IMMEDIATELY!>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489760/324580473/720803774?refcode=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE3ZDY0My1iNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVAoI6MLZa_UudcZKKHhnLmiwA29dmh2I04-rIs7ifg=&emci=fe3f8b71-d36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5643049)** _**[SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489761/324580474/720803774?refcode=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE3ZDY0My1iNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVAoI6MLZa_UudcZKKHhnLmiwA29dmh2I04-rIs7ifg=&emci=fe3f8b71-d36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5643049)**_
* * *
Friend, let’s be honest: the reason why this historic investment package is on life support is because of continued opposition from West Virginia Senator Joe Manchin. Democrats have all of the votes but one right now, and we need to make it known that we’re not going to let one guy stop us from much-needed progress. We can’t leave this critical legislation on the backburner:
* Advances for environmental justice through a new Clean Energy and Sustainability Accelerator.
* Investments in coastal restoration, forest management, and soil conservation.
* And tax credits for middle-class families shifting to clean energy and electrification.

It doesn’t take a scientist with a Ph.D like Matt to know how dire our situation is — we need to get this bill on President Biden’s desk. But it’s going to take all of us to make sure Congress hears our voices loud and clear. **[Will you join Matt before midnight tonight and sign our petition demanding the Senate pass the Build Back Better Act IMMEDIATELY?!>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489762/324580475/720803774?refcode=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE3ZDY0My1iNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVAoI6MLZa_UudcZKKHhnLmiwA29dmh2I04-rIs7ifg=&emci=fe3f8b71-d36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5643049)** _**[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489763/324580476/720803774?refcode=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTE3ZDY0My1iNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVAoI6MLZa_UudcZKKHhnLmiwA29dmh2I04-rIs7ifg=&emci=fe3f8b71-d36f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c117d643-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5643049)**_ Thanks for your support, Team West

If we flip this ruby-red seat blue by winning this Special Election, it’ll send a message to MAGA Republicans _that our people‐first movement is strong._

So as we enter the busiest months of our campaign, I need you to stand with me. [**Can I count on you to endorse my fight to flip our district blue? I can’t win without your support, Peter.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489812/324580610/1060055702?refcode=PAFC_20220108_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTIzODVmNy1iNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1dQWib_JCurhZKG32C7Do0uYLLznrCgwU0MXtq29Ww=&emci=f6c13b42-c86f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=052385f7-b770-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1755436)

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy.

So as we enter the busiest months of our campaign, I need you to stand with me. With gratitude, Phil | | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. Friend, here's something we're very proud of here at Steiner HQ.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40489911/324581262/360059203?refcode=em-1.8.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjIxMTQ3NS1iYjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eXv7ouAfOeNHd16pffq0eGvyUtSun2OZxijUfoeKVVM=)
I can't begin to thank you enough for your part in building a grassroots campaign here in the North State.

An average donation of about $29 means were supported by _real people_ \-- not corporate PACs and Washington lobbyists. It also sends a clear signal that lots of folks are ready for new representation in our community.

**Now that we're officially in an election year, the hard work of putting your dollars into action to flip this seat will begin ramping up.** We're organizing voter registration drives, and we're spreading the word about my campaign to working families, farmers, and small business owners throughout this community.

**[Will you take a moment to donate our average gift of $29.56 today? subject: Have you seen this?!👉
body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: I am proud to be endorsed by my friend, Ken Cuccinelli!
body:
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends,

I am proud to announce today my friend and fellow conservative, Ken Cuccinelli's endorsement of my campaign for Virginia's 10th Congressional District. It is my honor to be endorsed by such a strong voice in our party.

**"I've known Jeanine Lawson for almost 20 years, which is why I know she is a principled conservative we can trust to stand up for our values in Washington and defend the constitution from government overreach - whether that overreach comes from Democrats or Republicans. She is THE pro-life, pro-family candidate I want to represent me & my family as residents of the 10th Congressional District. Jeanine is a conservative who has proven she can win in deep blue northern Virginia, and I am proud to endorse her candidacy for the 10th Congressional District."**

Ken joined my team because he knows I am building an operation to defeat Jennifer Wexton and send Nancy Pelosi packing next November. But we need YOUR help to get there. I will fight for YOUR VOICE in Congress and stand up for our values. While Jennifer Wexton stands with Nancy Pelosi, I will stand with the people of the 10th District. I will work to cut taxes, defend the United States Constitution, and tirelessly serve my fellow Americans.
---
| [Donate $5 Today](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a7f1333afd&e=fc83fb200d "Donate $5 Today")

_**“SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.”**_
-Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden
Peter,

In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. **But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and[that’s why I’ve decided to run for the U.S. Senate seat opening in Missouri.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dcd6ba4cd23b46faaa64c33d38780303&_e=HWKR1pplFjk_EGEUfntHYeQWbcXR4MXMYvDQLRld21UdAJSLz9u6-vguqvUlpuwmeHj56D-S2K1qZ-ETUPMf-9eJ8y7iuaqf-BEABUQlQHHf4MxHexfk_9rjNN8hIo-8sBS7zn6udi-lFHdTzNLmE4itRQZvMVf4i-VBHyt0RUZWEgOguTtJ8lEzUMVGK9Bu45fgo6WgXuOVPjbz3w55kCdD0FAK2FCzrgAdc5PdChA6ANT3of3Gb7vL6YAcvQMERjsNT2P4UKvVkPzO3SYGwxOyWbApd8HHOBoXKpi5aylz4NAk0A3pS2nXf1K72RgArOV6aZgt6Cmv38E4Jcow08UCde3-HnSNG1eZrow6zB-Ws5xnJPRNHa-lIGgL6BpTATJECiHyrd8EXdYykQXaZRwMyb4ysUmTMAo6MKCPtBLD9E_RBo72oys7RzyPR6BwAGbWh0D0SfFY54k_p3PgWZmGPdWnRtbPHPdUeyjWqS4%3D)**

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American.

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement this year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!** [**That’s why I need you to help me protect this Missouri senate seat, immediately.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dcd6ba4cd23b46faaa64c33d38780303&_e=HWKR1pplFjk_EGEUfntHYeQWbcXR4MXMYvDQLRld21UdAJSLz9u6-vguqvUlpuwmeHj56D-S2K1qZ-ETUPMf-9eJ8y7iuaqf-BEABUQlQHHf4MxHexfk_9rjNN8hIo-8sBS7zn6udi-lFHdTzNLmE4itRQZvMVf4i-VBHyt0RUZWEgOguTtJ8lEzUMVGK9Bu45fgo6WgXuOVPjbz3w55kCdD0FAK2FCzrgAdc5PdChA6ANT3of3Gb7vL6YAcvQME-VLnf0jogG-S-aJY_9aMDKGbv5093i1ig8DQipuZl8BL8BsyE_ZYd-CElfByWLUbmrKcx3WmFL-4huZgDPWZ-NYDvaJonxY4Lo1BYmADLNGyw8zdYxlY33anwvjmVOxsZlJeBGEmqIYZrIWHa8RfPnoYVutvGLARidrxwIooeQeomKkZePuIXX32JTBuwaQmvMHORxzGiaeYFo1l1pKmp2M2SFqzg1fASPr3wOIEPkc%3D)

Peter, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds.

**As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST.**

Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. clean_body: Despite what the Democrats are willing to bid.... | No longer want to receive emails from Billy Long for Senate? You may . “SOLD! For $68,000,000,000,000 to the children and grandchildren of the American taxpayer.” -Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden Peter, In all my days as an auctioneer, I’ve never seen a bidder more eager to throw money away than this Congress under Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi. But the buck doesn’t even stop at $68 TRILLION, they’ve thrown away our American values and My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, I am a proud conservative American. I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement this year. We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially! Peter, I for one, will not stand for the Left spending trillions of dollars all for my children and following generations to repay with their hard-earned tax dollars. Taxes should provide for the well-being of Americans, not illegal immigrants and Democrat slush funds. As long as Joe Biden and his Washington Democrats remain in power, we can bet on Americans being put LAST. Under this administration, America has lost its way and I plan to work with a Republican Senate majority to put us back on track in 2022. | I don’t expect you to invest in my campaign without knowing a bit more about me and my record as a rock-solid conservative. name: Victor Davis Hanson
subject: The decline of American Citizenship

| | Dear Friend,
I wish to invite you to enroll in an eight-lecture course that I prepared with the help and under the auspices of Hillsdale College. It is called **“American Citizenship and Its Decline,”** and the online course is based on my latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

**[Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=d348a43e08bb47f08f05409e1270dcd8&_e=4ZEIsByFKetbahqH7xF1UKvawp13BQIQTBeLjqEnTAJNA_QWidEMofgyNXX3wiLEzPB0XlVkqSAFbVeLZDz0e7nJ4UDl8WdvgqsOcJoIJsKEnqDe7sUBYv72X7FAfcS5Ef63RYJa4p_uOp07c8uGtp6t6Usi_cswublu6n0n6pGL8tDvVYDjsqd1RZtzZKi-KKuH7y8c5Rfty2QGQ9GSLhqfV_NBRxYO7zvRTLMcCpG0Ok_HjPRaPVVSfMQQdjhw7h0DIUsNQqY1EQNmGYqCn-XOadoueHEkLUlh4lzascTyxwnzk299Sm6QR7TyP5uWrvUVN96ZbcFq-CfoURVGU8RNXSigsCzbcRdou0IyRxTFWnLtJWcXIy8g3c82WMTtoNk4Si1qEflqNg2vZOHp7iQcCC1JWVmrEMHeFdooudaZer0czMVOo3nGPyJ5OERimhM_M_V2grW5u9hOyKGiSw1XcaKPmtScm4Ajgup4Qx8%3D)**

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class—currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism—identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values—is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new changing and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

**“American Citizenship and Its Decline”** is free to enroll in, and you can begin the course today by clicking on the secure link below.

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/american-citizenship-and-its-decline**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=d348a43e08bb47f08f05409e1270dcd8&_e=4ZEIsByFKetbahqH7xF1UKvawp13BQIQTBeLjqEnTAJNA_QWidEMofgyNXX3wiLEzPB0XlVkqSAFbVeLZDz0e7nJ4UDl8WdvgqsOcJoIJsKEnqDe7sUBYv72X7FAfcS5Ef63RYJa4p_uOp07c8uGtp6t6Usi_cswublu6n0n6pGL8tDvVYDjsqd1RZtzZKi-KKuH7y8c5Rfty2QGQ9GSLhqfV_NBRxYO7zvRTLMcCpG0Ok_HjPRaPVVSfMQQdjhw7h0DIUsNQqY1EQNmGYqCn2lWv5MrZtESQ_iscJQ808HBLZRmS1FKJwaN28d8a3qMYpY1GCrWFJSO2mIkMyRCKyLE47FFPnBlGfsRP7z-eDpKe7yPAX56Es4n9KiCXIull4cUghcQ95xHxwEpEBeKrVpQT7j_n9SIgaHM4FtmrFVNoqZbxtKnjXgAeS7ZMOfDBCrSGubZXEF4OHgeC9QnCvvatsXSlyVfZpZ4rkAobOg%3D)

Best wishes,

Victor Davis Hanson
Wayne & Marcia Buske Distinguished Fellow in History
Hillsdale College

Your donation could make the difference between whether we could win or lose this election. We’re not just up against a guy who has willfully let us get to the edge of losing our democracy, who has protected his most extreme colleagues from being condemned and removed from their positions for threatening other members of Congress.
We’re up against someone who made a promise — over TEN YEARS ago — to build a new VA clinic that veterans in the Central Valley desperately need. We’re up against someone who has ignored the poisoned water in Bakersfield, which contains Chromium-6, a toxic chemical linked to cancer. We’re up against someone who has actively fought against passing a pathway to citizenship for undocumented farmworkers. We’re up against someone who has fought against vaccine access, done nothing to stop the spread of anti-vaccine fearmongering, and watched while people across our district have suffered from his lack of leadership during a global pandemic. We’re up against a guy who voted against working families getting the Childcare Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty by nearly half along with other measures that would provide support for families across our district. That’s not a leader that people in California’s 23rd District and across the country can count on. Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to keep building his own power base to be Speaker of the House — and we can’t let that happen. So what do you say? [**Will you donate today to help elect Bruno Amato, a veteran, product of the working class, and a Democrat committed to working for the people of the Central Valley? This is a grassroots campaign and every single dollar means we’re that much closer to defeating Kevin McCarthy in November.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHWKMpn7zIElPbG-EjyLRLV8VHsNYb_nSotb6IWo6X-D_-3Xvha4Z5L9kLXNRExd2FGQ_zgzrRycWS3e8ZCO1MrWh0aqfz14eLe5J7j0y85NpHRI_iZURCiovgd4LbrMiIjMtW1E00gyIFbrwe4xIcfGQSWV5cBLcjLHfe2wr0n_9F363osfVhkzB_cNBj9vU1oJy3gSngPskTVIwpx1PwF4gAZBCdpS6_6sJMsyeV-9ByhncIOiQ_kOgUkcMsBQXSJ4IoCjZMH6bBCZwRcJJ4SY/3ij/QH5Sl-ViTAqtgj7xts-caw/h1/ZsE5mS0T_yPQuPVUG044umYORGOijghEu9USfZpHx1g) Let's do this Team Bruno [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ykbrIoKFUeKFEa1cUjjjq-5MbvSDaSunAhY8K_5K9dHQdovkscSqzk43ju0z1fVmxI4QuFk_3TVMv12RcGX5ErmvY-Igy46LXOd8mFJ1RHLJA-e6ISmTbE_y9k3b2JQ0NfFH6d3k04WZYtphTrlUHJ9bhDSp6Xt7sp8N8UoKDOAjRmMln0ItSGhwpXC0FrAciwZ_kiMbz8kPy9OfoB3s4G6TWNEA7eThzuMSzjQ8VeKvHYaX-Nl7z1FyrabWmKP2YiuOqZLqze8CI-fWGRo4l0AgAH7z052COkLG9GhFLRoBEof1qQAB44imLzMIqk39oD-T4Ti27fX2SfGujwtKSA/3ij/QH5Sl-ViTAqtgj7xts-caw/h2/McYN100-cToH1pV58sEGx8dB0vF2C28dxy20Co9j3CY)

**Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District.** Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. clean_body: | | | Your donation could make the difference between whether we could win or lose this election. We’re not just up against a guy who has willfully let us get to the edge of losing our democracy, who has protected his most extreme colleagues from being condemned and removed from their positions for threatening other members of Congress. We’re up against someone who made a promise — over TEN YEARS ago — to build a new VA clinic that veterans in the Central Valley desperately need. We’re up against someone who has ignored the poisoned water in Bakersfield, which contains Chromium-6, a toxic chemical linked to cancer. We’re up against someone who has actively fought against passing a pathway to citizenship for undocumented farmworkers. We’re up against someone who has fought against vaccine access, done nothing to stop the spread of anti-vaccine fearmongering, and watched while people across our district have suffered from his lack of leadership during a global pandemic. We’re up against a guy who voted against working families getting the Childcare Tax Credit, which cut childhood poverty by nearly half along with other measures that would provide support for families across our district. That’s not a leader that people in California’s 23rd District and across the country can count on. Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to keep building his own power base to be Speaker of the House — and we can’t let that happen. So what do you say? Let's do this Team Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

Peter,

I'm sure you've heard, but just in case you haven't – Oregon's COVID-19 cases are at a record high because of the super-contagious omicron variant. While Oregon is doing better than most states, we all have to continue to do our part to keep ourselves and others healthy.

The best protection against COVID-19 for yourself, your neighbors, and your family is getting vaccinated and getting a booster shot. **[Get yours now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490662/324588508/164648953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScBqvDAg_Jb4BJY2AgkKplqh0ztaC-RFPsAVnYzxi1o=&emci=b26850f8-c66f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2d1349f3-c570-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729#/locator)**

**If you need help finding a place to get tested or to get the vaccine,**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490668/324588515/164648953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScBqvDAg_Jb4BJY2AgkKplqh0ztaC-RFPsAVnYzxi1o=&emci=b26850f8-c66f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2d1349f3-c570-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729#/locator)** is a great place to look.** My wife easily found a free clinic in the neighborhood for a booster and was there and back in an hour. [FIND A VACCINE OR GET TESTED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490674/324588521/164648953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScBqvDAg_Jb4BJY2AgkKplqh0ztaC-RFPsAVnYzxi1o=&emci=b26850f8-c66f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2d1349f3-c570-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15353729#/locator?) Simple but effective actions will make a difference for our communities in the coming weeks. Protect yourself and others: **mask up, get boosted, and get tested.**

We are all in this together.

– Tina [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490680/324588528/1650183785?refcode=em22_220108_vaxlocator&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScBqvDAg_Jb4BJY2AgkKplqh0ztaC-RFPsAVnYzxi1o=)

body:
As we begin the new year, Kim is ready to keep working on the issues that matter most to you. But to best represent your interests, she wants to hear this grassroots team's top priorities for Congress this year. Hey Peter – we noticed you haven't taken our 2022 Priorities Survey yet.

As we begin the new year, Kim is ready to keep working on the issues that matter most to you. But to best represent your interests, she wants to hear this grassroots team's top priorities for Congress this year.

**[Don't miss your chance to share your thoughts with Kim. Take our short priorities survey now and let Kim know what issues you would like to see Congress address in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490842/324588948/-1013040117?ms=em22_220108_surv2_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em22_220108_surv2_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em22_220108_surv2_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220108_surv2_esrv_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=n9%2FzmA98Vzqi2KXVmM9pRwyFLkR8ggvBsQr2BxKRP9G%2BGHoJ0IO4z0dcfO3cif72rGJyZS8L%2F9pqvxcy3bsc2Mj0KKXM3I7C5BwdJPsgRK5BPQ3FDZ4Ht3Je4OVQO2r%2Fs6TuobmsP%2BgIxDDS7mjy%2Fy1dATVwYsn73cmdlVi58jw%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGkyPja97Totad1KOD2cdf3Ajfbji3wEMbjl6IJTOQQ=&emci=3c81c38d-f76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2a1349f3-c570-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15820338)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
Subject: Will you take our 2022 Priorities Survey?
Date: Wednesday, January 5, 2022
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40490843/324588949/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTEzNDlmMy1jNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGkyPja97Totad1KOD2cdf3Ajfbji3wEMbjl6IJTOQQ=&emci=3c81c38d-f76f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2a1349f3-c570-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15820338)
Team,

In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more.

But as we begin the new year, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Kim remains focused on finding solutions to the issues that matter most to you in Congress. **To best represent your interests, Kim wants to hear directly from you.**

**Recently ousted Democratic Nassau County (N.Y.) Executive Laura Curran told Fox News:**

_“Unfortunately, my party, the Democratic Party, just conveys weakness right now. It almost feels like elder abuse with what's going on with President Biden. He has a hard time putting a sentence together. I think everyone gets nervous listening to him talk, he's going to mess up. What we need always, and especially now, is someone who exudes confidence and competence. Someone who sets a reassuring tone. And we're not getting that at the top right now, and unfortunately, I think your previous guest, Karl Rove, is absolutely right. I think it's going to be a bloodbath for the Democrats in the midterms.”_

November is coming and even the Democrats know that it is going to be a shellacking!

As the Biden administration continues to create chaos and push a Socialist Agenda, inflation is at the highest levels in three decades. This has left hard-working Americans questioning how they can provide for their families.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Tucson, Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Eleven years ago today...
#

Friends —
Eleven years ago today, I was holding a constituent meeting for the Tucson, Arizona community, which I represented as a Congresswoman. A gunman suddenly opened fire with a semi-automatic weapon, shooting me in the head.
He then turned on my constituents, shooting 18 people. Six innocent lives were lost in the attack:
Christina-Taylor Green.
Phyllis Schneck.
Gabe Zimmerman.
Dorwan Stoddard.
Dorothy Morris.
Judge John Roll.
I will carry their memories with me now and forever.
The anniversary of this shooting is always painful for me and the community I call home. But I’ve never seen this as a day for looking back. I see it as a way to remember why we move _forward._
When I had to step down from my office as Representative to focus on my recovery, I never stepped away from my life’s purpose: working to make my community and my country better. I was working to get better, and thinking about how, in a new capacity as a private citizen, I could contribute. And after the Sandy Hook shooting which killed 26 people including 20 children, I knew the time had come for a big move.
It’s not easy to stand up when others tell you to be quiet—especially when you are wrestling with the pain and trauma that gun violence leaves in its wake.
And that is why I am grateful for the opportunity to work with our team at Giffords, to make lifesaving efforts and fight back against the gun lobby.
Success is only possible if we’re in this together, just like my recovery was only possible because loved ones and members of my community stepped up to help me in the darkest moment of my life.
This has been a long haul. It was always going to be that way. But I’m optimistic that if we keep moving forward, we will save lives and emerge victorious.
Thank you for standing with me in the fight.
All my best,
Gabby Giffords
[**Make a $3 contribution today. Your donation will immediately be put to work in a campaign to pass universal background checks, elect a gun safety Congress, and hold the gun lobby accountable for encouraging and enabling violence in our communities.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220108-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1430_3935704_PQskpP&akid=1430%2E3935704%2EPQskpP)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220108-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1430_3935704_PQskpP&akid=1430%2E3935704%2EPQskpP)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1430%2E3935704%2EPQskpP) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=a2847361823f4e018a52ce9049b6b1e3&_e=DBCPLyOvkcQ4tjLnU-jtKYQkpEUqAIWELltkLDi4LWMjHf3dy3XBzLQdG-K-rl9g-zu_fLzfyGBQaGDPNGUFIFFPcBauOFb-tP1nfyHQoe95RR3KsIGSs4w6dTWL51CYYCR3f2WclQWsOgRO67TbAWQir7p3US-0mAtw0LTeT4qetlL_qm45Ss3CSExH0htoZJFCAdfyTGjBpfDG2UK3nm5H31NqlbReQAFZxmWbPVokQYobltSOFvSQzBZdl5kxHTlGOLS1qPqYw_TJONz3AhNiGAMabeD-xsCSgyiqbc7GYB4a0Q_ULD1fAhCtP3LirFbi2EW-XtpYT7Zn_lSjhdmKSUlUPIsQyjmGiRkYSsub-S8lH8JS7iTpBPOtlAmjtaD00O7Wwz-mhIi5z0DUy-8xgR12ASTTdxWiKoVBJM8kc2YSl0FRhX5mV80Ayn3FcF1uRCCjFpc5_3B5uwFH3SxBT9VteWOK0SSxPjdJFG942QcKUzu-nrBw83O8wDBL) [](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=a2847361823f4e018a52ce9049b6b1e3&_e=DBCPLyOvkcQ4tjLnU-jtKYQkpEUqAIWELltkLDi4LWMjHf3dy3XBzLQdG-K-rl9g-zu_fLzfyGBQaGDPNGUFIFFPcBauOFb-tP1nfyHQoe95RR3KsIGSs4w6dTWL51CYYCR3f2WclQWsOgRO67TbAWQir7p3US-0mAtw0LTeT4qetlL_qm45Ss3CSExH0htoZJFCAdfyTGjBpfDG2UK3nm5H31NqlbReQAFZxmWbPVokQYobltSOFvSQzBZdl5kxHTlGOLS1qPqYw_TJONz3AhNiGAMabeD-xsCSgyiqbc5KuYI4xFdweH-TPyj5vZlE2LulzpyxcX7R_6dP2-3bTMJjqq_ZeKPo-JCUJ1QNuECoZQlByT4mf2-mjO3Lg9xP490ac66FP7L-sXj4JBHWQNFB2Rci7pBCNymG3V4X3sdHEA_Ef01rUVfkMxzG0prwgu7v4BwOY82My0tlPjELkB-K8hdLR06j8u1PxJ2w3FTmlkrmw90XuJbLO40xiWng) I called the opportunists flooding our state "political tourists" because that is exactly what they are. Here are my actual words:_ _ _"The contrast in the race is pretty clear. We have a group of candidates who've parachuted into Pennsylvania because they see an opportunity to further their interests...I’ve been referring to them as political tourists or Airbnb candidates."_ We're finally getting the attention from the national press for being the _**_only_**_ Pennsylvanian in this race. I’m not a career politician who has spent their life in Washington, Hollywood, or New Jersey. I’ve spent my life building businesses, creating jobs, and carving out my own American dream.
I’m proud to have created tons of great jobs right here in Pennsylvania and help other PA families realize their own American dream.
That’s why I’m offended to see celebrities and opportunists walk into our state and try to take advantage of this race.
In the GOP Primary for Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate Seat, I stand alone as the only candidate with meaningful ties to the state and a proven conservative record.
I have proven conservative credentials and long history in the state make him stand out in a crowd of carpetbaggers with no history of standing up for the conservative positions they now claim to espouse.
Further, I'm the only candidate actually from PA which means I have a real-world understanding of Pennsylvania’s communities to offer a cohesive plan for the state. While other candidates move here, treating our seat like an At-Large district, I know Pennsylvania is unique, and I’m prepared to lead.
[**Pitch to help me Put Pennsylvania First Again >>**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=a2847361823f4e018a52ce9049b6b1e3&_e=DBCPLyOvkcQ4tjLnU-jtKYQkpEUqAIWELltkLDi4LWMjHf3dy3XBzLQdG-K-rl9g-zu_fLzfyGBQaGDPNGUFIFFPcBauOFb-tP1nfyHQoe95RR3KsIGSs4w6dTWL51CYYCR3f2WclQWsOgRO67TbAWQir7p3US-0mAtw0LTeT4qetlL_qm45Ss3CSExH0htoZJFCAdfyTGjBpfDG2UK3nm5H31NqlbReQAFZxmWbPVokQYobltSOFvSQzBZdl5kxHTlGOLS1qPqYw_TJONz3AhNiGAMabeD-xsCSgyiqbc4AH_J1Olrid0f9Lw8Oe_d9WsXedAGBeScDh-9-gEt1obSBZUMEt-ZPmvhQiyzwGOsz53tYJibYC8822ciu4jHjf84D2L5qFtK-w5Xcceba5yebbwV9wHXeHLpU4XRRfD904aQS1spJE0NI4AZilRQcUChFZWHaufD2Bxsf_xiUiqDLiwOSY9YJODyK7qIJoRqWtI4012ezAo4_RXqkOcvT) Thank you, Jeff Bartos |

body:
To move forward, we need to know that every donor who gave in 2020 is ready to give again at the same level - or more if you can. I need to know today, are you are with me? | |

Dear Freinds,
---
**Thank you** to the more than one hundred supporters who have already stepped up with a contribution, like this lifelong Oregonian and new supporter who texted me from Douglas county! Now I need to know, **are you are[ready to take a stand? ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y0TiD2LFqyDZoCgu8R4O2v9q7UnwWv6Q40mxS5lbPeMs2Qsonz24deoLRdpCIVGQVTvjjYittfEqPmtjjwxrHCHZRAMZPkAHlVwnxTU4Iq4If7bOZGCeM8cGmgC1oVTHHMDar__cpQQ12EhY_rm_bi2iPcuaWKsC3vzw6J078iSdy-3b8FhKJNS8uwA_UTmsFS_g_IOcjom2c8-cfZjZw5Uy0ryBZjX6DaPYPwy0O92eMFU50_z48L6B2wQ17bWAGpqH9yT8RGy7lqfEk0PqBBvD0GROSvOHNzoe94SAlxdA/3ij/ypIFhmlXRhKtvjnIwD3g3w/h0/bclccOa-AtiVahWYD_Qpt83ASeqViEu9vBVP7Jnj6_A)** You know what is at stake for our country, our climate, and our communities. body:

| The Rundown
---
| Welcome to The Rundown! Here's your monthly updates from Blake Masters' campaign & a roundup of our national media coverage.
Counting down: We're exactly ten months out from the General Election.
---
| | | [Visit our Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpkQJseiIMa6VPpvUiQjkC4EW9oxo8nHgPTchEx9s3BJwl3qdTG7DmcaJ0jbnWMyTPBa4z0R7gXYVqnpNh2z7EqRfteAuoPHJkA==&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==)
---
| | |
---
| From the Trail
---
Blake has continued to speak at dozens of rallies, clubs, and private living room meet-and-greets across Arizona. He's got the energy and the momentum! That's reflected in his fundraising numbers; he raised a whopping $1.38 million in the final quarter of 2021, dwarfing his opponents' numbers.
---
| | |

Blake speaks at the campaign's volunteer Christmas party at American Way Market.
---
---
Blake addresses potential supporters at Dream City Church.

| | |
---
Blake holds a roundtable with a local veteran's group in Show Low, AZ.
---
---
Blake meets with voters for lunch in Springerville, AZ
---
| | |
---
|
Major Media
Blake appeared on [Tucker Tonight ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFye1IrkRp9HJXfbJcHbC3mywsmtwMrWY8RJvOJERoh7FYmq0szPQXgYVWt04SGuBc7JRmiKuxwLbPGg6fY7uT7dhlTH1YRpvoFdDUvF_qdOd8msC7i-rmIIxnjZmxscgGvXlbhYBpXuCQCST97u4AEQ==&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==)to discuss Nancy Pelosi's comments on Congress members trading individual stocks. Blake called for a ban on members trading individual stocks, generating a lot of buzz.
Blake joined [Mornings with Maria](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFSq6boWhEgfnaa21WadYBxqUXsMdSrtXXd2L7f20ud9sVviz1PrFdZs9QqIpC9_NvSLCPSov39v7TfjnhzEtADvNHXoeqnarPhflizndOsToPYV3cqynNIg==&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==) to talk about Biden's border crisis, a ban on Congress members trading individual stocks, and Blake's use of NFTs for fundraising.
On One America News [The Real Story with Natalie Harp](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFJlSYi-S0iGJSrIOUBEf-Yq0aXMovTarc8aQcOu41qScz4YGVPURTZiY_DDFlmhKMjZRB-Kw2lP1c5fW-9CIeLTDrEi2zABSXTxLVgWXrMW9uqYBWmkQ9wqGxbo9M2HMsTgT-1uZ0SCtpC-m8PpklJvYLecWrvpWG2Z8De4fgkgs=&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==) Blake discussed his proposed ban on Congress members trading stocks.
On Newsmax, Blake joined [Chris Salcedo](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFqrVvdTGdJBb_VvvGWDP_F_1HD_m7bHEsCuvoXlU1UC1cU_L5k0ChD8GpmXNKphRvCqaitYLyhCDbSQJGf_EtUft7_zL-wx6wLA-D1FWWRmh6hMyaVyZ_IQ0Y-EjQQt9Tz0V4pU-eXNDbKytG9BvbDQ==&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==) to discuss the border crisis, Biden's handling of the pandemic, and Biden's unpopular vaccine mandates.
On [The Charlie Kirk Show](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIF74FC8ywTLPO5suaHOjZk8shTetxgRjQuqjaHpEmz4Ry_oM9Q60YZa1T-R7kIf0Z-QFI-sKD2EkJDSJLqLBCRM5SR0wSjLNsIFTdjCq1F-OT2i4LIV46OLqkKRmcXkkGBuYne6DH2ABkyprJ8KDGJNxS4zloyM4ivWzSrigrsxkOH8e1QshvdJH0ZUwh_yXRkx0xYIXGxyZ8=&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==), Blake discussed inflation, Paul Ryanism, immigration, big tech, and the left wing weaponization of America's institutions including the military, the police forces, the DOJ, and the need for fresh, new faces in the Senate.
Recent Headlines
Axios ran a [story](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFZtyy29-pBUPW_uLgNfXYjAlDijzaazv5PhaHJPMvx-V1WCsbCU9cEdyMeYdjTvgYJBiFecV9g2Q4MxTy87X1fgF-k3UCyf4fZJYqbFHX7wU4tTp1MRHf9ASE_TzwzWAJsJIfZmzi2ob1SBMOBa58xU8CdYiwyYcMRdWBeEHy2uQzzhx0yUT-Fw==&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==) on Blake's creative, bold use of NFTs for fundraising.
The Washington Examiner [reported ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIF2u5A8bSIvP_PJSgrfuvQDXvtGQPT6iD3QdEotri89SbyG_qzIYjL_iCcreYqdTZuAtPSwc2zi-uSuUg-GmvrepGlae2VCphZDKgtTVd8I5A91pzGUuXD8BhclpRdwDS5eyZG6kctTdv4sT0CxzAZUQz9lCqPiU0j&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==)on Blake's eye-popping $1.38 million fundraising haul in the fourth quarter of 2021. Thanks to Blake's bold, creative use of NFTs, over $550,000 was raised in under 36 hours.
IM-1776 interviewed Blake for a lengthy [profile](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yBpE_fEnrGNsw0y_21QDXp9oiiTnlpvHElONenlgKAlF-N6VE81VpnJxoLHs3CIFoxuGwyx1LE3Vhy0rB4RVbUA8e9SqT2lwJFaGNJYBZRtSiWA2lc_EygFQU6t75HLkJD63AqyT7ulFdUXqRhi_3FNHyn2odDxSgwU7Dxy1qyEpuTmXrdjfit7mOEzf3KLV&c=KAawWX7xl1bcOJRvh7c_sKPsXZwpUSfkS-7K1Tq55X-pott47hT2Sg==&ch=pURgcZw2bA2bsbcN5aswErlhmpTN1E3m4CpedbCu2YRwMykFu7GfGw==) that covered the Rittenhouse trial, modern technology, China, and much more!
---
| Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from the boys!
---

[**JOSH RILEY**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=9e6c71f7a8de4a618571750116100b61&_e=RSFyiTX41w9TBDIIOeS4w7SQec6FUSHywqtq2d_dbab0i8ujShIRqkx-sBMyQQ56yX7ymaV5gCiFS9n8B9cwOMVykDAhz2ecCm73EA4oiJKYf6ctHAfOzkH_jhKkQl-egBGMwRSvZ7k3P5XY7exFK_-LM5kdrQAgcJw6G5LDA7YngkGwmhm47sg5vFOPDIAOscHz0K13l_RPEc2bwx-exSzeMqDr7G6IAvg8BvkmSg2AXLyAGiSle-q8bsBmDvBqb0LrdrrKsMaV1Y6cro4dWL87uC8ebocVHhkuH5RP_b0NzstO8M706vYGsFCEP7DbVSDAPp7ttCO7yDcMhYrT1MF2TreG7fhDBpaTPhGI3IPgV2iHazpNysTHMUUPqWfkTwIOnbXPcQ98JEzFmjC2KGgSlZsg7aGNFbduJRRgtgz51RWNFT9ENgeMgSN-gQeqNgOppbGOvmstBJBfHNlRuRrZlzVp_lcMEEYrqyj2PAbVbhs3KEzlMUf639it1cWiLGO75mfF95WCew57KDxV-w%3D%3D) Josh Riley is only coming back to sell out our districtーhe's not even really here. BREAKING NEWS: Ron DeSantis’s stockpile of 1 million COVID-19 tests go unused and expire
Friend,

Here’s some straight talk from me: Gov. Ron DeSantis needs to go!

**He’s soft on COVID, wants to overturn Roe v. Wade, signed a voter suppression bill into law, and is focused on running for president -- not governing our state.**

**[I’m giving my all to beat him (that’s a promise), but I can’t do it without you. So I’m coming to you with an urgent ask, friend: Please donate so we’ll have the resources we need to defeat Gov. body:

Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69582%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h3u1Itami6V20DUtFzXZVg&sysid=1)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69583%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zr9UF6kS%2fXwEdhw%2bu4H08Q&sysid=1)

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69598%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=huIRYuLkJPS0fC9Mwc90yA&sysid=1)**
