**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69599%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eh4hbwrsMBckyVxgsXUs8w&sysid=1)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69590%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d149lpItI10rSuyY%2foLhjA&sysid=1)

name: Emily Creighton
subject: We can’t go dark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ][IMG]

Folks

I’m all about the numbers. I mean, heck, I spend all day looking at them
and right now—I do NOT like what they’re telling me.

We are $5,684 short of reaching our Ads Fund goal. If we don’t close that
gap, our ads program will go dark. That means not a single ad running
online while the GOP continues to hammer Tim with attacks. Zero. Zilch.
Nada.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6424?t=1007&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Have you chipped in yet towards our $15,000 Ads Fund goal? If not, we
need you to chip in RIGHT NOW.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6425?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Chip in now >>

Let me explain why this goal is so important to our campaign: our online
ads are a way for us to interact with folks we otherwise would never be
able to reach. While getting Tim’s message out there is priceless, these
ad buys are pricey.

And the cherry on top? The GOP is running tons of ads with no shortage of
lies about our Democratic agenda.

We’ve got to build up and build out our digital ads program now so we’re
prepared for the long, bumpy road to Election Day. And with the GOP
spending nearly $10 million already, we have a longgggg way to go.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6424?t=1008&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Every donation, even if it’s a few bucks, will make all the difference.
Will you chip in $25 to help us meet our goal and build the strongest ads
program this state has ever seen?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6425?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6425?t=1012&amount=50&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6425?t=1015&amount=250&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6425?t=1016&amount=25&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ]Other Amount

Let’s go!

—Emily

Digital Fundraising Director

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1965%2E3611125%2EERDmLf ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpsg9anl5miq8utred3i3pno6fm45cup67eveolo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z01fqgvii8gj8mg9ftaekmktdna60r97a5flsj50_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhagk53nqn6u73rpg6ed4parq48omd8nrkndetig_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)
---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpokof3k2k4sb540a8b400j9283esk4j1bmkogr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z11bvmvso30lqnp7kaiqmq42qhfudpsf0va0qnfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zgs4v6qqhb08503r149hb5m9j27n4hcc426jjq60_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc7585jmuf4p53putfvfh2sdp00c5atbpmfresog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za56ej5ejvk1q24jsn6kg9d8jqh6bn7s41lieqm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zc3vj4d3dt94r3lagh72344n1bp976sk61hqrf98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z1oraqo0o9tuaq7klvb7qga79mkgtekint29e2dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z42dqnvomb67jhoib7hdie301b0sua906rr8ic4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cdge8o34c5h2bs)**

subject: Humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?38t2z--fgxr-4qqlpo4&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | This is Leader Kevin McCarthy. I’m humbly requesting 30 seconds of your time to go over some numbers.
* Republicans are 5 seats away from the majority.
* A record 23 Democrats have retired so far.
* This cycle, we have some of the best GOP candidates I’ve ever seen.

I want to introduce you to 8 of the best:

Esther Joy King (IL-17)
Amanda Adkins (KS-03)
Bruce Poliquin (ME-02)
Ryan Zinke (MT-01)
Tom Kean Jr. (NJ-07)
Monica De La Cruz (TX-15)
Wesley Hunt (TX-38)
Derrick Van Orden (WI-03)

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb0z-4qqlpo2/)
---

* 5 seats to take back the house
* 23 Dem retirements
* 8 tier 1 candidates who will crush their competition.

**The numbers are good.**

But we have one problem: These candidates need resources to go up against the liberal money machine.

---
| | [ENDORSE OUR RED WAVE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb10-4qqlpo9/)
---

As Republican Leader of the House, I am begging- will you chip in $10, $20, or anything you can give to help us ensure victory in 2022? I will personally match every dollar you give for the next hour:

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb11-4qqlpo0/)
---

Thank you,
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb12-4qqlpo1/)
---
Leader Kevin McCarthy

---
**A note from Kevin:**
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb13-4qqlpo2/ "Kevin McCarthy urgently needs YOU to take action")
---

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. I’m incredibly grateful for your support in this fight and want you to know that I’m doing everything in my power to secure victory for Republicans. Your sustained support fuels our grassroots movement and provides us with the resources necessary to combat the Left’s political games. If you’d like to make another contribution, I will fight tooth and nail to ensure every cent goes towards advancing the conservative agenda and winning back the House -- **[ EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-38t2z-1sb14-4qqlpo3/ "EXPRESS DONATE HERE >>>")**

The fight is far from over, and we’re only getting started.

Kevin McCarthy
Leader, House Republicans

name: Great America Update
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6640%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9waLdx3IsPBJdNajOzUrig&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69508%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z9mK6%2fOObNbMFB35C%2baINw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69509%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R091JKufeFA8hJ7h5WVNsA&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69508%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z9mK6%2fOObNbMFB35C%2baINw&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69500%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=prAIPfVt1lk%2fybtFq%2fIYDw&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6640%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9waLdx3IsPBJdNajOzUrig&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6640%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9waLdx3IsPBJdNajOzUrig&sysid=1)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I could really use your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40491851/324594452/-1281091919?refcode=e20220108_mwh-facts-gif&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmJkMTU4Ni1kNTcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pUBLpB9RDzEcpcxh7w7146yNkRs6qxvNN6iTkhDHy1Y=) Hi there, In a moment I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign but first, let me explain why your support is so critical:
* More money has been spent attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat this cycle

* If I lose here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate

* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection

* We can't win without your support

It's no secret that this race will be an uphill battle. In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer. name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: Why I'm in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I took an oath to always fight for what is right
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492174/324596110/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2095-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDEwNjA2NC1kNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YM-Seu5SJQfffTGzHSNkq9dhvZUTVUtqL-u1MkxTerI=) Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hard-working parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first Black female chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th congressional district as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his _own_ oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. **With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard.** **[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 today to power my campaign, and I can't reach it without you, friend. Can you make a $5 donation today to help this little Black girl from the South make history again and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492175/324596111/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2095-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDEwNjA2NC1kNzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YM-Seu5SJQfffTGzHSNkq9dhvZUTVUtqL-u1MkxTerI=)** Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you.

Val Demings
---

clean_body: I took an oath to always fight for what is right | | | = Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hard-working parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first Black female chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th congressional district as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his own oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard. = Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you. Val Demings | | = | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. Thanks to Presidents Obama and Biden -- who passed the Affordable Care Act in 2010 and then protected it from **_relentless_** Republican attacks -- **a RECORD number of Americans just signed up for life-saving health care!**

This HUGE accomplishment was only possible because Joe and Barack made it happen, and we’re so grateful for their leadership. That’s why we're asking Democrats in Pennsylvania to sign their thank you card, but **_your name is still missing!_**

body:
This year, there’s a lot at stake: between the midterm elections, rising rent, student debt payments, and the Covid-19 pandemic, working people need a leader they know they can count on to deliver for them. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefJnfKiihAlrdRpLjRDaNWBAlMDHkvqS1Rar3Y99DP1iFkcGePkpbztLm0eMesEXwNd1APu2JqY1gsBoWrS5fJB27gt-kfGqbFc8Xt_ixvGlj4YVNpfH4sANuHVJrP9xzSJ2XChBOn6ezUPjgw_g1vgr0QT_nsMbOWNqsQvxO-0u2nCl8uWwQ3y4mErMZWLqpwzstWkamJ5mK4RI8cyyOM_p0qYjA8yfDO0oAP6_mUnRE/3ij/57D1IR-mQXmFyPhnS_JuOA/h0/QAVBH_feuVSQhaGJ0GJYN6sRsinUguRb0GYThOyHGsE) Peter, I’m a resolutions person. And this year, there’s a lot at stake: between the midterm elections, rising rent, student debt payments, and the Covid-19 pandemic, working people need a leader they know they can count on to deliver for them. That’s why I settled on this resolution for 2022:**This year, I’m going** **to speak truth to power regardless of the circumstances.**
This campaign is about fighting for a brighter, more equitable future for all of us — and if anyone is standing in our way, they better look out. I’m not going to hesitate for a second to hold corrupt politicians accountable, and if you’re with me, I’ve got to ask:
[**_Will you chip in to help make sure we can give this race everything we’ve got this year? As a grassroots campaign, we are 100% people-powered — not a cent from corporate PACs — which means your donation of $5 could have a huge impact._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiD2Xqbqsfc7Cp1gq5cTUt4mxDEwRDHRgXj9tHT-Qnv-pXyZVQnazwyWsOAoNnf1E4zv4-dEtAjin_c622O5RbToY221Ust3sZW-ED8F1GAARQ0qpwwcp1kN49Xk-Bn32CNZxYi2GzEr62786o1_tEwnVscoAd2yLuHinNzy1Ra9rauKL7RcLfRvmBnDcACDc7Oj8j08yycUmDOPVQi81ous2krPk-jiovpIupuk1PTaeR8mai-EiR7sjAamzJ4HhXebo1t_M9X3OsespYn_-G5tZrGTdsCb5LRr0hOscHZSvMyIrnAyC4tnLnK0S1iIiA/3ij/57D1IR-mQXmFyPhnS_JuOA/h1/6THjlFeNoKtc-Kve9l8XaX-8lofpALmaoNC72d1tthI)
[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiD2Xqbqsfc7Cp1gq5cTUt4mxDEwRDHRgXj9tHT-Qnv-ppy-I8pznNxZCr0c0XF4QjHugZ-jnewCCAjedqa6IFObKNFzikiYgZcPpAwBIGcFaZTtIXmpL9Z-T8q4AaO1aNKqN6MG4IHoz5vLGV2aWCQq-_4s80wNbp1gFzi7ynoDyVSrCwyWwht5PsXCrWeSgv8qdPpvMwSwWc0aklpBVWoo0Px31mAWFynk_r-y44MC5AXs6yDo7S1XkmfV6yCmb6nmCWQJRCEiXhtLHkHEAr9ww4D4tHtpGkacH4kGAH_38Y21Zkv5ThEIaKsiXnSFen/3ij/57D1IR-mQXmFyPhnS_JuOA/h2/WN_LD2ewDJHz-yB4qZyZ14IhX-7r8XuozhH3E_U0KaI) Next week, when Tennessee redistricting maps are released, I’m ready to put my resolution into action.
The GOP has threatened to gerrymander our district, because they know it will weaken the voice of Black, brown, and working class people in Nashville. Redistricting is an issue of civil rights, and our team needs to be able to respond to any map that comes out.
**When our movement speaks, people listen — and the truth is, that’s all thanks to you.** Every $5, $10, and $25 donation we receive from supporters helps us expand our reach just a little bit farther. By providing supplies for a few more volunteers, placing ads in one more zip code, and phone banking for one more hour, we are gaining ground in the fight for power and representation for working people. Thank you for helping me accomplish my New Year’s resolution, Peter. [**_And if you have it in the budget today to chip in, even if it’s just a couple bucks, it will make a real difference in our ability to fight — and win — in 2022._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiD2Xqbqsfc7Cp1gq5cTUt4mxDEwRDHRgXj9tHT-Qnv-qQhjf_sd92zAJhPR_eyIL4OPzgEOXqA35ZYngJdJLthrH6GN4gqrdnZGlD7pn2l31gFrBh9LQhb_OgX4KpVks_1UOKxsMXRxBiJFy7kcAONw-QMJ5xAdRCKz9wSNEVAi1UFfILytNZaZHZssP8IJrGtD4hTa7teBw2lyuG4Nw9muFKPYXDeoCk1SjCv-J013JcYmI6R-w34fGbyAV9TYJievZnL-RqaAbu1S9b6t_zQJtWtXlsvml0lejSywuVTA2K2C6OteSa2gH7gkOrHx6f/3ij/57D1IR-mQXmFyPhnS_JuOA/h3/aUcodyKgqPSUz5zSGTZrr48HD8vCkprdj8qe7MZSyL8) Wishing you and your loved ones a great 2022! In solidarity, Odessa Kelly
Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEiD2Xqbqsfc7Cp1gq5cTUt4mxDEwRDHRgXj9tHT-Qnv-pDdaMD7ibX-inlwU63tbt4qWq21w43wA-pRmTJVeJt2VkRGQHH6R-Eo-332B0uBWHjv7ThNSZ_jXEjeAaKTMAhBPnpQnIpCHYlf4jYvQQTr3LG-E4dUnSId7l-FwNFWx87Jr2ARjpoWfojYH70eyBpK5H_Cl-J2bizaKPr_zNV2tLVHkI0IRPUwLRUg4FdS-pGy_RdgXzVOorWRN21XQ3NnZ0AIatznT-M9DBn6JoxcSEroSkGB3pOCzq0aMmCLWvCPwUj12kAeHo7ZuFHnN0E/3ij/57D1IR-mQXmFyPhnS_JuOA/h4/HkzLqhgAlKJZ18cNRX2yfwhZWUKnb-DEzwt8qYS8FWk)

clean_body: This year, there’s a lot at stake: between the midterm elections, rising rent, student debt payments, and the Covid-19 pandemic, working people need a leader they know they can count on to deliver for them. | | | Peter, I’m a resolutions person. And this year, there’s a lot at stake: between the midterm elections, rising rent, student debt payments, and the Covid-19 pandemic, working people need a leader they know they can count on to deliver for them. That’s why I settled on this resolution for 2022:This year, I’m going to speak truth to power regardless of the circumstances. This campaign is about fighting for a brighter, more equitable future for all of us — and if anyone is standing in our way, they better look out. I’m not going to hesitate for a second to hold corrupt politicians accountable, and if you’re with me, I’ve got to ask: Next week, when Tennessee redistricting maps are released, I’m ready to put my resolution into action. The GOP has threatened to gerrymander our district, because they know it will weaken the voice of Black, brown, and working class people in Nashville. Redistricting is an issue of civil rights, and our team needs to be able to respond to any map that comes out. When our movement speaks, people listen — and the truth is, that’s all thanks to you. Every $5, $10, and $25 donation we receive from supporters helps us expand our reach just a little bit farther. By providing supplies for a few more volunteers, placing ads in one more zip code, and phone banking for one more hour, we are gaining ground in the fight for power and representation for working people. Thank you for helping me accomplish my New Year’s resolution, Peter. Wishing you and your loved ones a great 2022! In solidarity, Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Team Beto
subject: re: Abbott's big announcement

body:
We need to fight back and make sure Beto has the resources to compete with Abbott's media blitz.
#
**Here are three critical things you need to know about Greg Abbott:**
1. He's officially announcing his run for a third term as governor TODAY.
2. He's planning to attend 60 campaign events all across Texas in the next 52 days before the March 1 primary election.
3. He's rolling out a HUGE TV and radio ad campaign to blanket the state starting Monday — backed by tens of millions of dollars.

Here's what this means: **Abbott knows that Beto is a real threat to his power** and his special interest mega-donors will spend anything to take our movement down.
**We need to fight back and make sure Beto has the resources to compete with Abbott's media blitz. We can defeat Abbott — but only with your help.[Please, chip in today to elect Beto to be a governor for ALL Texans.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51574?refcode=ema20220108-170596&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=170596%2E444211%2EAyEZfZ)**

Abbott started this race with **$55 million** in his campaign coffers — that's a pretty big advantage for us to overcome! But this grassroots team absolutely has what it takes to beat Greg Abbott's big donors.
**We're building the biggest people-powered movement Texas has ever seen,** so we can't let Abbott steal our momentum with his major ad buy.
**It won't be easy, but it will be worth it.[Will you donate $3 or more right now to elect new leadership in Texas? Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re just days away from our most important fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492455/324598064/-42398318?refcode=em20220108pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTNkMzgxNC1kZjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PVRaeJRDVCDX2oI2q7NxO0pwIijFj_3MlU4mRTi5WKQ=)

Since Derek announced his campaign for governor in March of 2021, it’s been an amazing ride. We received endorsements from more than 120 current and f Friend, Since Derek announced his campaign for governor in March of 2021, it’s been an amazing ride. We received endorsements from more than 120 current and former federal, state, and local Republican leaders. The groundswell of support for our movement has been incredible. You can find all of those endorsements on our website **[here](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=36ea281092284afaaf3ec53ddd0ba597&_e=ccwWv7LKrxhdj0fWTry7ES7TA1tQ5FDrdtAOgupxIBZjRuEhwdGGdiU94ycsNQ83nNI7nQbG7hxj304ffzQOyU5pjcPff4LXck1-DCMyX0vcdfWVvy8a93znt1VmfEJVxnQ9DgleI2nduSfU8UsW4yQYMxabi_dl-Xj1IiA1lAIC-r4BO9-LB2x5NnneZB4mPKIIK164YyXGJ0D8sOrInb_0NboSUCJRC_PEq7PDLreuqLQ-jsbZ5Y3K97ifsNCfsGLqD6A7eroe0Bf42uNYr-OXI4yCibMU7yhB4YwQr0t2ZRxPSQafmt4n_rdQprmkQ4ANgqAH1xTcvNpv5519_Vn-ugHrSZh3pdarxTYXCHyI1y0GrgUuDb6SazvyxjoRijoTXyJ4cNus5c5P60UysSWVJCgxcz5boBrmh287n_JamKI09_0V4eb-k3HWx2zWqzhZx4jUNcAB8_rAn-nc1A%3D%3D)** , but we also wanted to make sure that you saw the two VERY big endorsements Derek secured this week to kick off 2022. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Bill to Double Taxes Passes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Taking a Stand](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorx12nj7eQ9QkYrysgX2DhgW3zgiNfn9-irkzMYIWrTnw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_8_final&n=1) Courageous school board members across California are taking a stand against COVID mandates and demanding an end to the State of Emergency. Their letter concludes: “ _Our children have carried this burden for too long. Statewide masking, testing and vaccine mandates are not the answer. We are asking for your support to allow us to return normalcy to our schools_.” You can ask your board member to sign the letter [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooCxEhKFjHHFgmfD9FR-hfqHsaXR7E9x1Z-P5vyla7nIIdfFqbiIkiOwHj3fkDzK78&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_8_final&n=2). Our movement is making itself felt in every community, at every level of government, in every corner where corruption threatens our kids' future. Meanwhile, at the Capitol: legislation to _double_ state taxes has passed its first committee. The bill, ACA 11, establishes government-run single payer health care. Those who waited months for their EDD checks can guess how this will work out. My term in the Legislature doesn’t end until December, so I’ll be fighting harder than ever at the State Capitol all year. At the same time, the election for Congress is quickly approaching. Voting begins in four months. If elected, I’ll continue this blog to give you an inside-the-Capitol look at what goes on in Washington, DC. And I’ll use the national platform to show Americans how radical policies are ruining California, so our country doesn’t continue down the same path. The first week of any campaign is the most important, and we are off to a great start. Thank you for the incredible support. I can only win with your help. [Help our campaign reach its Week 1 goal](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_8_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[ElectKevinKiley.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=46JphwgMS_nx4Jy_hVRltV7bfMPCE9ZT2udr1wr_AxY&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_8_final&n=4)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley Congressional Committee 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan_8_final&n=5).

Peter,

The basic concept of self-defense is under attack by the radical Left.

Far Left Socialists in Congress who want our police officers defunded are the same people who want you, the law-abiding citizen, _**to have your God-given 2nd Amendment rights taken away.**_

Without the ability to defend ourselves or have law enforcement ready to arrive on the scene our most vulnerable communities would be devastated by unchecked crime, and our nation would quickly fall apart.

See my thoughts on the issue of our 2nd Amendment [_**here:**_](http://winwith.marcmcmain4congress.com/ls/click?upn=lZvnmcJxd0mfDGNFeIqpb1aPT1ugeFZHjPi-2BY7VcmmOa3xBPjjSfF-2BqnApccjAvq01uvC5Jg7-2BrmLNYM-2F6m45cAB8-2Fur02dEqi6Iyk7Plk0-3DetDF_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFXGxvvnq45B7T7qCQ-2Fp6Dj0CmuFp9IkfGGwYBeHDagSAO8nTJssA03tUre2ZDzXfISvbIlmcm6q2REUQ1KkSzgjNbHkcgBlTI-2BGHroF0d3uxtIPUgGiKGoj-2BLNveR5cDo5w9JdhZqyGzokwTkl55PnFKvB2uwBBHmSCVC6ieS1P-2F-2FFZnMcsMSjpdftn6Opj7hA9PbDdpDH58KwpECuqjcBV7UbEwZ30twn6fXZ4Fpj1nGGSXzjF84T73hH3MLQhHZeutDA55HO7t8602IsQBbmhYgM8NZy3eml6KVasrU7-2BibyAKJ8eryTjslLprNlZiv41PLIg1Blgx0DrbvQXUG2Pk-2FS0-2B22Bk7lruWhlUS5eZEXFmg4xf8K9ZCH81SBxjyBPEg8zuGsLZoU2xNnjkz-2BrpfMK-2BF8Fn9eoZl7HPE5-2BIU8arvcLZBOBpLhbwzbbjW7yI-2BDkr-2FI0mhU0Xt392HoftZDpeQWmiUIL2MdFVum3-2Btyny0n5iWNthnBugatPobwht6Z7YHN-2Ba1XtgiIZeFHonzkQUXG6mZ-2BOlRQWOi94A4iaMYSjqtJJmktGn0YW97RS0Xk1gFqC3hUPK6L9bbqu2Kr21lCoRLPf5wtiC2L66eimzPXDH6SyV-2BFRnWTtQUhFQnJdeSYFa6g7gtV1-2BFRUrCkddcp8VfcXHplENEX9IyTuplfApC71tQeMoq94uaNVYfbl2bl1jQuv5heZHuLQWMjgeCa4gTLYYSEWEdXzj3KapgsKyk4-2BYXwdJr7cDKAeH8OZCsQvo5FHFc-2FGA5m4zgmQ3-2B69rUtKBR7c3mlCwvuKUnA9I6jQWFNyOSEeKDA7LKBP8y8zaGGtpz1wNQ6)

---
* **Walton County Sheriff Joe Chapman**

As your next Congressman, I will always BACK THE BLUE. We cannot abandon our law enforcement officers when they put their lives on the frontline to keep communities safe.

_And we certainly cannot abandon our citizens’ ability to defend ourselves when danger comes around the corner.
_

clean_body: | | | | Peter, The basic concept of self-defense is under attack by the radical Left. Far Left Socialists in Congress who want our police officers defunded are the same people who want you, the law-abiding citizen, to have your God-given 2nd Amendment rights taken away. Without the ability to defend ourselves or have law enforcement ready to arrive on the scene our most vulnerable communities would be devastated by unchecked crime, and our nation would quickly fall apart. See my thoughts on the issue of our 2nd Amendment If you haven’t heard, I have received some incredible endorsements from law enforcement leaders, including: Walton County Sheriff Joe Chapman Loganville Chief of Police Mike McHugh Morgan County Sheriff Robert S. Markley Retired Snellville Chief of Police Roy Whitehead As your next Congressman, I will always BACK THE BLUE. We cannot abandon our law enforcement officers when they put their lives on the frontline to keep communities safe. And we certainly cannot abandon our citizens’ ability to defend ourselves when danger comes around the corner. Help me BACK THE BLUE with your own backing of my campaign. Donate any amount today to show your support for law enforcement and our 2nd Amendment Rights against the Radical Socialist Left: | | | | | | In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

name: Dr. Bob Lorisner
subject: Re: How I will reopen Congressional channels of communication, including town halls
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Hi. Dr. Bob again. This week we were asked a great question, and we'd like to share with you our answer about implementing better communication and town halls. My opponent has avoided public forums since his first term, but count on me to serve and communicate at a standard this district hasn't seen in several years. _**Town halls don't require courage, just the ability to respectfully share, value, and listen to diverse opinions. My opponent has avoided public forums since his first term, but count on me to serve and communicate at a standard this district hasn't seen in several years.**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492794/324608475/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=) **Dr. Bob Lorinser commits to reopening Congressional channels of communication, including town halls** [**REGISTER FOR OUR FIRST TOWN HALL NEXT THURSDAY!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492795/324608476/29242929?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=&emci=e1d17cda-e270-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=19503066-e370-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) [MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492796/324608477/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=) **We need your support. Can you[chip in today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492797/324608478/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=) and help Dr. Bob reach every elector in Michigan's First District? ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492798/324608479/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=) Hi Friend, Although there are no formal written roles and duties of a member of Congress, a Congressperson has four assumed duties and responsibilities:
* Legislative and policy Work — Draft and introduce legislation
* [**Constituency servant** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40492799/324608480/817068520?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUwMzA2Ni1lMzcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dfv4z7dPK-6M0nhyAKRsBJrGISW6MaTnb_xNMpRSIuA=&emci=e1d17cda-e270-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=19503066-e370-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)— Help constituents solve their problems
* Education/Communication — Articulate and take positions on issues; educate and inform constituents about legislation
* Representative — Represent and advocate the district's and constituents' interests

In addition to those duties, they have:
* Political and campaign work
* Press and media responsibilities
* Administrative and managerial work

All of which are usually done working six-seven days a week for 60 - 70 hours each week. Dr. Bob is committed to improving communication and constituent engagement. Unfortunately, this is where our current Congressman fails. But, it's where Dr. Bob will excel. "Not all Congressional duties are in Washington," said Dr. Lorinser. "The work begins on the ground, at home, and face-to-face with citizens. This process is important to me. Any Representative who genuinely cares about the opinions of their constituency needs to make themselves available." Dr. Bob will:
* Employ mobile staffers from various political backgrounds with different areas of expertise; who know the area, live in the district, and understand rural Northern Michigan issues.
* Encourage staff to travel and meet constituents in the community without the expenses and burdens of a limited office. (The current district offices' inaccessibility is a common complaint among residents.)
* Ensure staffers are easy to reach and readily available at regularly scheduled open office hours in every county. They will explain, educate, and lead; they will listen and follow.
* Regularly join staff in visits to small businesses, schools, non-profits, manufacturing plants, and trade/labor councils across the district.
* Have local staffers play integral roles in D.C. and work on policy and legislative issues. His Deputy Chief of Staff will be based locally in the district.
* Use social media, press releases, texting, e-mail, surveys, and a daily web blog to communicate and inform the public, including upcoming votes, and notify citizens of his positions before voting. Dr. Bob's communication team currently responds promptly to serious questions from citizens in comments and private messages, and these efforts will be enhanced – not curtailed – during his term.

Dr. Bob shares citizens' frustrations that Rep. Bergman does not partake in town halls. His last was shortly after he was elected in his first term. Dr. Lorinser will enthusiastically commit to town hall meetings and ensure each is publicized and open to the public, unlike his opponent. "Unfortunately, my opponent doesn't participate in any type of open public engagement," said Dr. Lorinser. "That's not leadership. It doesn't matter if you're progressive or conservative; you deserve someone who will listen to you, respect you, and strive to represent _everyone_ to the best of his abilities. Count on me to legislate, serve, communicate and represent at a standard this district hasn't seen in several years." body:
100,000 URGENT RESPONSES NEEDED | | | | **100,000 URGENT RESPONSES NEEDED:**

Here at Democratic HQ, we just launched our very first Priorities Survey of 2022.

If we're going to defend our House Majority in just 10 months, we need to know which pressing issues matter the most to you. **

So please, will you take our survey before Sunday night?**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-YTZkq~_) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)
---|---|---

We're coming to you with a quick and important request straight from Democratic HQ:

[**Will you let us know your top priorities as we kick off this critical election year? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

The holidays are always a time of reflection.

And we just spent the holiday season reflecting on how important this grassroots team is in the fight to defend our House Majority.

Because of supporters like you chipping $3 at a time, we CRUSHED our final and most important fundraising goal of 2021.

**Make no mistake: Steadfast support like that is what powers our fight to elect House Democrats all across the country.**

But if we want to protect our Majority for years to come, it's absolutely CRITICAL that we hear your thoughtful, on-the-ground perspective.

[**So please: Can we count on you to take our first and most important survey of 2022? Let us know what 's on your mind before midnight tomorrow. >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/GRD0BZV-)
---
**** Thank you,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46218550&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDg3OTcxOQS2&l=14319885&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46218550&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDg3OTcxOQS2&l=14319885&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

subject: FWD: There’s a rift growing between Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene: I’m going to exploit it.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia
PO Box 532
Rome, GA 30162
United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: Look how far we’ve come, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
We’re coming up on the one-year anniversary of when I decided to explore a run to represent Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate. Bear with me to get a little sentimental here, okay? 😭
Back then, I already knew this journey wouldn’t be easy. But we knew the campaign you, me, and supporters everywhere would build together would be *special* + it would be *BIG*.
And WOW, did you all prove me right. Our grassroots team...
* Outraised all our primary opponents + the GOP frontrunners quarter after quarter of 2021💛
* Has over 170,000 donors... plus an average donation of just $27 💪
* Received support from ALL 67 PA counties and over 50% of standard U.S. codes 🇺🇸

So one year after first deciding to explore a run for U.S. Senate, let me be real clear about where we stand. **We are going to win this thing because of people like you, Derek.**
But back to the “this isn’t going to be easy” side of things. The fight to flip PA’s Senate seat is going to be one of the most important races of 2022. (Maybe even the most important.)
Plus, whether we pull it off could determine whether Democrats get a 51st vote in the Senate to pass the filibuster and clear the path to protecting voting rights, holding insurrectionists accountable, passing a liveable wage, ensuring weed justice, and SO much more.
**[So here’s the deal. Every single grassroots donation adds up, which is why I’m coming to you now — to see if you’ll pitch in your very first $3 and join the grassroots team that’s gearing up to flip Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40711?refcode=ema20220108-4130&t=3&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)**
**[Contribute Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40711?refcode=em20220108-4130&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)**
Look Derek, this journey didn’t really start one year ago. Fighting for Pennsylvania is kiiiinda what I’ve been doing my whole life.
You might have noticed I have the zip code 15104 tattooed on my arm. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 13 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
After serving my community, PA voters honored me by trusting me to serve as their Lieutenant Governor, and keep fighting like h*ll for the same things I’ve been fighting for the past twenty years:
* Establish a living wage that is at least $15 an hour
* Pass legislation to ensure health care for all Americans as a fundamental human right indistinguishable from housing, food, and education
* Fight for second chances + reimagine criminal justice reform
* Combat climate change — which is a real, urgent, complicated threat that requires immediate and coordinated action
* Legalize weed nationwide for jobs, justice, veterans, farmers, and revenue
* Fight for the union way of life and our workers
* Protect our LGBTQIA+ communities and continue to push for equal protections under the law

And now? I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I believe that every community is worth fighting for. And I *promise* that I will fight for you + your community in the Senate as if it were my own. **[So I’ll ask one more time, Derek: Will you chip in to help us keep growing the historic momentum we’ve built over the last year?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40711?refcode=ema20220108-4130&t=23&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)**
Every bit of support that comes in today will go a long way in building the kind of campaign we can be proud of — _and one that can win_. I'm so unbelievably grateful for everything you do, Derek. 🙏
We have less than a year left until this whole thing is done. Ready to give it our all and win this thing?
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220108-4130-footer&t=24&refcode2=4130_434096_1HboaO&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4130%2E434096%2E1HboaO)

body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198306:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198306:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198306:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)**_

If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish.

[**Chip in $3 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198307:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)
[**HELP TEAM HERSCHEL BUILD EVEN MORE MOMENTUM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198306:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)
Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the _MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION._

We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. **[Keep in mind that the future of the nation hangs in the balance because the Georgia Senate race will determine if Republicans can win the majority and get America back on the right track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59198306:JsMhYoEVN:m:1:3253819041:54469AAA7CB4C75DF1B56DDAC14DB800:r)**

Thank you for your support,

Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Help Expose Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

Fellow American - on Monday night, the University of Georgia Bulldogs will take on the Alabama Crimson Tide for the College Football National Championship.

To celebrate our Bulldogs playing again in the title game, Team Herschel is doing something very special...

**... we're giving away a UGA #34 jersey signed by Heisman Trophy winner Herschel Walker and personalized for the winner!**

**[Will you enter to win before kickoff on Monday night?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667ce59856ad44e78bc81bc1d7426089&_e=I3zVnI47SHN5y0JvNrJzXCY91kFiCknNQ2Hb2MZkajG9mp_24mzy6iVWa-KyhdDXHHjXvf5hoFwMwBnW2fXaXNa8r1iHYNUb-1g0FzkeNSpRg-oSUH0SJoNQLsBiVRp7jETkLIARWz2Rslij_v_SWaaQkGX4OZ0xWC9KmXTFB744a9gv-0iMwJpBk3rFkb_CcM6C1KQvu_ZcGd1F8kYEfrMe9JBsSec5-GjOsHvUjbug2Xs0IuNcMCDxb_mPGVjLa3hDbqRIy-MpyBvwehGCWpaCP12GD6peSNJ5IozOjFep7FpweJnDBn5n_cxlWjSq1Y36PqQ4QVsBScI4_gahDsKC2iqfLQWX_O-8mtnj8czAJib9wYS5jp0hr8w3a0_EF2HW_LnHNwQ4Ti7adEGGHh8zsXhdAwrYftzdW3jYirBhJqGN5KjV5yhvUHZbaEOy-83vhBCoNITqF0tybWxK3c_gi2ecUCmTMyj8bg5L5FU%3D)**

Georgia last won the National Championship when Herschel played for them in 1980, so we're thrilled to have another opportunity to win on Monday.

If you are the lucky winner of our contest, we'll make sure that Herschel PERSONALIZES a note on the jersey with your name!

**[To enter, simply make a contribution of any amount to support Herschel's campaign for U.S. Senate](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667ce59856ad44e78bc81bc1d7426089&_e=I3zVnI47SHN5y0JvNrJzXCY91kFiCknNQ2Hb2MZkajG9mp_24mzy6iVWa-KyhdDXHHjXvf5hoFwMwBnW2fXaXNa8r1iHYNUb-1g0FzkeNSpRg-oSUH0SJoNQLsBiVRp7jETkLIARWz2Rslij_v_SWaaQkGX4OZ0xWC9KmXTFB744a9gv-0iMwJpBk3rFkb_CcM6C1KQvu_ZcGd1F8kYEfrMe9JBsSec5-GjOsHvUjbug2Xs0IuNcMCDxb_mPGVjLa3hDbqRIy-MpyBvwehGCWmVhMnbVi0klpQMmkcynctJFG0taY-Q1Yk_Ozt00OpFQvPQ67-gh-hprKkqtGlzxCGF0gQTGbks8522GqUB8uifQ1oo2cGn6PBTJRhu129QzZ7EXUmLrVJBPxdRcUEC2lUDybOTbTF7G_0yV2FYmqwByf0ac0vmT8VS2dzB4wfC0ttkaQs1DnkokZWpErPlacU-OxGuAFq9ZwOP4WAzd6Xs%3D)** , and we'll put your name in the running.

Thanks,

Team Herschel

And their parent organization, the national Club for Growth has been a strong ally of President Trump, his America First agenda, and conservatives across the country. I am proud to be scored as one of the most conservative members in the legislature and look forward to continuing the fight for our conservative values as your next Congressman! | "DONATE NOW!" | Fighting for you and your family, | | Russell Fry Proven South Carolina Conservative | The Federal Election Commission (FEC) allows an individual to contribute up to $2900 per election; a qualified political action committee may contribute up $5000 per election. The primary, general, special, and runoff elections are considered separate elections for the purposes of these limits. Contributions that exceed $2900 from an individual and $5000 from a qualified political action committee will be automatically attributed to the next applicable election, unless specified otherwise. Federal Law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle. Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. Contributions from Federal government contractors are prohibited. No corporate checks or corporate credit cards may be accepted. Partnership and LLC contributions may be accepted under certain guidelines. Please call 301.654.3220 for further information regarding eligibility. name: Fair Fight Action
subject: Where We’ve Been & Where We’re Going: It’s All Thanks to You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
In 2021 we saw a tidal wave of Jim Crow 2.0 tactics, from threats against election workers to election sabotage efforts at the local level to the more than 580 anti-voter bills that were introduced in almost every state legislature across the country.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40493107/324623807/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU1NDAxOS1mNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2kl-0OyKFLH2CuxejxiqKZUxVpk3YY6sReKAdZ9Mpk=&emci=5e3a3f2a-f370-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=21554019-f670-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1037277)

| | Dear Friend, In 2021 we saw a tidal wave of Jim Crow 2.0 tactics, from threats against election workers to election sabotage efforts at the local level to the more than 580 anti-voter bills that were introduced in almost every state legislature across the country. Yet, in the face of these challenges, together we have also achieved a number of victories for voters in the last year—and we want to share just a few of them with you, Friend. With your support, Fair Fight Action continues our mission of advancing a multi-racial, multi-generational democracy where every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot, have their ballot counted, and make their voice heard. This has included orchestrating a first-of-its-kind Fly-In of dozens of voters from 16 states who traveled to Washington, DC to share their personal experiences encountering barriers to the ballot and demand federal action to combat voter suppression and establish national voting standards, organizing over 83,000 voter calls to Congress, and memorializing Georgia’s ongoing discrimination in voting [in the Congressional Record](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40493108/324623808/1052082947?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU1NDAxOS1mNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2kl-0OyKFLH2CuxejxiqKZUxVpk3YY6sReKAdZ9Mpk=&emci=5e3a3f2a-f370-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=21554019-f670-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1037277). While advocating for federal protections for voters, alongside our allies, Fair Fight Action simultaneously supported battles at the state level in the face of more than 580 anti-voter bills nationwide. Together, we helped mitigate the harm of these anti-voter bills, including defeating provisions that would have:
* Ended no-excuse vote by mail in Georgia
* Imposed strict photo ID requirements on vote by mail in Arizona; and
* Dramatically restricted student voting in New Hampshire.

**[This is just the beginning of our fight for voters, Friend. Will you reinvest in our mission in 2022?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40493109/324623809/-2107014871?refcode=IE010822NEW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU1NDAxOS1mNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2kl-0OyKFLH2CuxejxiqKZUxVpk3YY6sReKAdZ9Mpk=)** Voters are the reason we do this work; they are at the heart of our plans and advocacy efforts. Fair Fight Action has crafted our 2022 goals with voters in mind:
* Continuing our innovative advocacy at the federal, state, and local level to advance pro-voter goals and mitigate the harm of voter suppression, and building voter protection programs that respond to the unique threats 2022 presents.
* Advocating for voters in the courtroom as we are going to trial. Our Fair Fight Action lawsuit, filed in 2018, against the Georgia Secretary of State and State Election Board challenging their discriminatory election practices is going to trial on February 7, 2022.

We remain on track to move towards our North Star of ensuring every vote is protected, every election is fair and free, and every voter’s voice heard. — Team Fair Fight Action [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40493110/324623810/-2107014871?refcode=IE010822NEW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTU1NDAxOS1mNjcwLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H2kl-0OyKFLH2CuxejxiqKZUxVpk3YY6sReKAdZ9Mpk=) |
---|---|---

| | Folks, my team just wrapped up our first strategy meeting of 2022. Let me jump right into a little of what we have planned as we officially head into election year.
1. **Grassroots organizing is at the core of a successful campaign.** This year, we’re doubling down on our efforts to get folks involved in our campaign both in-person and online.
2. **We’re bringing new voters into the fold.** By registering and empowering new voters across the district, our campaign believes that we can increase Democratic voter turnout.
3. **We have to keep our message out on the airwaves.** Folks, this doesn’t just mean television ads, either. My campaign is ready to embolden our digital advertising efforts as well.

name: Urgent Update
subject: re: NPR in danger.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
We need to know where you stand on this!
| | | **URGENT UPDATE: Republicans propose a bill to ATTACK NPR’s funding**

Republicans are attacking one of our most important news sources, and we need to know where Democrats stand -- **but we have NO RESPONSE from you on file in our live poll:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5842?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=2505%2E9716520%2EvAOABV)
**Do you support keeping NPR fully funded?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5842?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=2505%2E9716520%2EvAOABV)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/5842?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220108-UrgentUpdate-DefendNPR-Pros-sl1&akid=2505%2E9716520%2EvAOABV)
---

Team -- The GOP is going on the attack against one of our most trusted news sources -- National Public Radio (NPR).

A group of far-right Republicans recently introduced a bill that would **PROHIBIT** all federal funding for one of NPR’s critical funders, threatening a news organization that has brought truthful, non-profit journalism to Americans for _decades._

Republicans want to tear down, defund, or delegitimize EVERY trusted news organization that threatens ultra-conservative outlets like Fox or OAN -- and that's why we URGENTLY need Democrats like you to speak up.

**_We set a goal of gathering 10,000 responses by midnight, but we still haven’t heard from you!_**

**Do you support keeping NPR fully funded?**

| Chairman Steve Hopkins Speaks at Take MS Back Event
---
On Thursday evening Mississippi Freedom Caucus Chairman Steve Hopkins stepped into the pulpit at Riverside Church in Flowood and gave a fiery speech to nearly 250 patriots from all over Mississippi who have pledge to get involved to “Take Mississippi Back.”
Chairman Hopkins stated, “I’m not here to make you feel good, what I’m here to say is going to make you mad... your enemy in Jackson isn’t [one person], it’s what President Trump calls the swamp. And the swamp is full of RINOs, Democrats, and bureaucrats.” Hopkins pledged that the Freedom Caucus would never vote to raise taxes or do anything that would increase the size of government, but that the Caucus would do everything in their ability to protect our God given freedoms and liberties.
Hopkins went on to encourage the people to get involved in the grassroots movement by holding their legislator accountable because “there is nothing politicians fear more than an angry voter.” The Chairman concluded by stating “We need more Liberty-minded candidates to consider running for office, people who will protect the rights of the people, and not the powerful... and that’s how we take our state back, one vote at a time.”
Senator Chris McDaniel also spoke at the event following Chairman Hopkins. For Freedom,

body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!

_When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_

[**Take a stand to help me EXPOSE FAUCI >>>**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a288a17ecc174585964a1208378487d8&_e=Euo12BZ_DfLmhAgDU5h8zSt-uXcfXV6rIXmHgSqlPIGuev-OTKAKkDzVa4it0JZsUtgCqLzqacvLCDwYRvndDVoQtWpM884kPXlhjDr1n_rB4ArA-ElEJkKm2s3fOvdJ6kGe0pbvOk4KY0peK7hne87ZMshTuZVeQDO-2E1YfyIw-p100m9H1pEfSIhAbLxLcZ3P_JxhFEvdRZ92NpLYBggCD9G6z6zi5xDJNYqFbyQ9C8GKfAL9ka0zHDvOY4BHoISu-FYZlPkSkZWIpAQUxSDbFb4LC19F_FM3yW8frhkLtUjHPaNdEz38V9ht_n3CM2ls-6mMFnCp-LYGFBVQs2Urn4U-DQfQ_nL8ue2VCTtMk6h6SZ8M0NICojUPeunjupaU-IPkPvRjbLONJfaQDoyf7Fs6C33xZaKvaQOplpXM84C4trpcvYjCT7ZVFplYDHKzUyXHieRcLwpNcRdDkw%3D%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Our Democracy has broken down...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
...but I have a plan to fix it. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b61caadd9a02/i-am-running-for-congress-8789066?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=b4f83d264e&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Folks,

Our democracy has broken down. Neighbors have a hard time talking to one another, and different groups of Americans only trust news sources that tell them what they want to hear.

On January 6th, 2021, Donald Trump and his allies like Scott Fitzgerald, then a brand-new Congressman, empowered and encouraged a group to storm the United States Capitol in an attempted coup.

On Thursday, our team joined together with community members to mark the day with an outdoor rally to support democracy.The insurrection demonstrated to all of us just how far our fragile democracy has been eroded, and how critical it is that we protect it. [**That’s why I’ve released my comprehensive plan to restore our democracy — before it’s too late.**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=12f0205d1b&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=946217b8b7&e=356c0699dd)
---
| Participation and voting in free & fair elections and peaceful transitions of power have been the cornerstones of our country since its founding. We cannot ever again abide those cornerstones being attacked by people who tried to substitute their will for that of a majority of the people.

[**Can you contribute $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 today to help share my plan to restore our Democracy with as many voters as possible? **](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=d1a9ae74fe&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [DONATE](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=cc477fd29d&e=356c0699dd "DONATE")
---
| I’m a student of history, I’m a lawyer, and I’m a passionate believer in American democracy. I’m also gravely concerned — that’s why I’m running for Congress — so I can do everything I can to restore our democracy. **But I can't do it without your support. **

[This five-point plan is a living, breathing plan.](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=35dc7aa3df&e=356c0699dd) As the campaign continues, and we continue to talk with great folks like you, we may make additions and adjustments to it. The truth is, our democracy needs constant maintenance, like a car, a furnace, or a human relationship. It’s not “set it and forget it.” We must take care to ensure it survives for the long term.

[Will you help me work towards restoring our Democracy with a contribution to my campaign today?](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=86259dbb28&e=356c0699dd)

If we work together, if we agree on the basics — that our nation relies on the consent of the governed, we will be in much, much better shape.

Forward,

Mike

clean_body: ...but I have a plan to fix it. | | | | | | | | | | Folks, Our democracy has broken down. Neighbors have a hard time talking to one another, and different groups of Americans only trust news sources that tell them what they want to hear. On January 6th, 2021, Donald Trump and his allies like Scott Fitzgerald, then a brand-new Congressman, empowered and encouraged a group to storm the United States Capitol in an attempted coup. On Thursday, our team joined together with community members to mark the day with an outdoor rally to support democracy.The insurrection demonstrated to all of us just how far our fragile democracy has been eroded, and how critical it is that we protect it. | | Participation and voting in free & fair elections and peaceful transitions of power have been the cornerstones of our country since its founding. We cannot ever again abide those cornerstones being attacked by people who tried to substitute their will for that of a majority of the people. | "DONATE" | I’m a student of history, I’m a lawyer, and I’m a passionate believer in American democracy. I’m also gravely concerned — that’s why I’m running for Congress — so I can do everything I can to restore our democracy. But I can't do it without your support. As the campaign continues, and we continue to talk with great folks like you, we may make additions and adjustments to it. The truth is, our democracy needs constant maintenance, like a car, a furnace, or a human relationship. It’s not “set it and forget it.” We must take care to ensure it survives for the long term. If we work together, if we agree on the basics — that our nation relies on the consent of the governed, we will be in much, much better shape. body:
It’s time to get to the bottom of this awful conspiracy
| | **_CAN YOU BELIEVE THIS?_ ** **ROLLING STONE :_Joe Manchin Just Tore Out the Heart of Biden’s Agenda_ ** Where does Manchin get off thinking that he can derail the agenda that 81 MILLION people voted for in the 2020 election? **_We’ve had ENOUGH!_** We’re delivering a scathing petition to Joe Manchin — but it’ll fall flat unless **8,100 good Democrats** add their signatures before MIDNIGHT. [↓↓ PLEASE, CLICK BELOW TO ADD YOUR NAME ↓↓](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Manchin_Support_Biden_Agenda/?refcode=VPP_20220108_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX) | [TELL JOE MANCHIN TO SUPPORT JOE BIDEN’S HISTORIC AGENDA »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Manchin_Support_Biden_Agenda/?refcode=VPP_20220108_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX)
---
**** GOAL: 8,100 SIGNATURES || DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT ****
Team, this may be our last chance to pass Joe Biden’s ultra-popular agenda and SAVE our Senate majority in this year’s midterms.
But if we can’t convince Joe Manchin to support Build Back Better, then we will have nothing to show voters come November!
**That’s why we’re gathering a grassroots army of 8,100 Democrats telling Joe Manchin to do his job and finally SUPPORT Biden’s agenda!**
[Please, team, we need you to stand with your President RIGHT NOW! Add your signature and tell Senator Joe Manchin to support President Biden’s historic agenda »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Manchin_Support_Biden_Agenda/?refcode=VPP_20220108_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX)
[_8,100 SIGNATURES NEEDED:_ TELL JOE MANCHIN TO SUPPORT JOE BIDEN’S HISTORIC AGENDA »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Manchin_Support_Biden_Agenda/?refcode=VPP_20220108_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX)
---
Thank you,

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1098%2E878179%2EXg1yyX)
---
